bul.acidball.description: Горещи снаряди за киселинския пръч, причиняващи болка при контакт.
bul.acidwand.description: Изстрелва силно корозираща киселина, ослабяваща враговете.
bul.bearhat.description: Умело направена от мечешка кожа. Увеличава щетите.
bul.bonehat.description: Покрита с резби. Магически, абсорбира част от входящия урон.
bul.boomerang.description: Изглежда като банан. Не особено заплашителна...
bul.boostpad.description: Ускорява всякакъв движещ се обект. Може да се използва за сложни движения.
bul.boxinggloves.description: Първото правило на клуба за борба...
bul.building.archer.description: Вярен спътник, стреля по враговете. Обезпечава се с боеприпаси.
bul.building.archertower.description: Търпелив и внимателен страж наблюдава отвътре.
bul.building.barrel.description: Изключително експлозивно. Внимавайте! Не правете внезапни движения!
bul.building.battery.description: Лична електроцентрала. Електрическите структури могат да бъдат свързани към нея.
bul.building.bonfire.description: Изработен от внимателно подбрани камъни и дърва. Загрява ви през зимата.
bul.building.cactuswall.description: Опасна като кактус! Податлива на горене.
bul.building.chickenfarm.description: Добър, всепогоден курник. Не забравяйте да изчакате пилетата да пораснат!
bul.building.circleofreturn.description: Използвайте Камък на Връщане, за да се телепортирате обратно до него.
bul.building.conductivefloor.description: Леко щипе краката ви, когато стоите на него
bul.building.coppermine.description: Добива мед от недрата на земята.
bul.building.deaddoorl.description: Тази врата не е най-здравата, но е вечна.
bul.building.deadwalll.description: Стените от мъртва дървесина имат специална способност да се възстановят. Сякаш са живи. Защитавайте ги от огън!
bul.building.decorativefloor1.description: Какъв вид крепост няма подове?! Използвайте различни варианти, за да го направите красиво.
bul.building.diamonddoor.description: Много красив. Автоматичен, като в супермаркет!
bul.building.diamondwall.description: Искри се на слънце. Автоматично се поправя. По-здрава от златни или каменни стени.
bul.building.electricspikes.description: Трудно е да се види на земята, когато е изключена
bul.building.electricwall.description: Искате да получите малко електрически удар?
bul.building.farm.description: Не забравяйте да изчакате пороците да пораснат!
bul.building.fireballtower.description: Таен и магически. Изстрелва огнени топки.
bul.building.firewatchertower.description: Проста, автоматизирана система за гасене на пожари.
bul.building.floor.description: Враговете не могат да строят върху вашите подове. Изглежда добре, все пак.
bul.building.freezer.description: Направи нещата по-хладни! Помага да се охладите в пустинята.
bul.building.goldendoor.description: Чудо на средновековното инженерство: може да се отваря и затваря. По-здрав от дървената врата!
bul.building.goldmine.description: Бавно добива златна руда от дълбоко под земята.
bul.building.goldwall.description: Повърхността е гладка, с някои издатини. По-здрава от дървени или каменни стени. Не гори.
bul.building.guard.description: Движи се бавно. Разглежда се отдолу на шлема си. Следва команди.
bul.building.guardarcher.description: Движи се бавно. Харесва да стреля с лък и да охранява зони. Следва команди.
bul.building.knightmannequin.description: Специална структура за трениране на наемници.
bul.building.lamp.description: Странно устройство, произвеждащо светлина. Предпазва от нощни чудовища.
bul.building.mercenary.description: Следва те. Един за всички и всички за един!
bul.building.motorcyclewithcarrycot.descript: За теб и приятел! Бавен, но има странична количка.
bul.building.phantomtower.description: Доверете се на вашата безопасност на зли духове.
bul.building.platform.description: Стоейки на нея, можете да стреляте през вашите сгради!
bul.building.policecar.description: Собственост на областния район. За поддържане на реда!
bul.building.privatechest.description: Ще запази това, което сте поставили в него, дори ако напуснете играта.
bul.building.repairbox.description: Поправя предметите, поставени в него, по някакъв начин.
bul.building.rockmine.description: Бавно извлича камък от дълбоките подземия.
bul.building.rockwall.description: По-здрав от дървените стени. Не гори.
bul.building.sleigh.description: Време е да се плъзнем по хълма!
bul.building.snowmobile.description: Движи се по-бързо по снежните повърхности. Седалка за двама.
bul.building.trap.description: Изпружена, когато се стъпи върху нея, задържа жертвата на място. Враговете не могат да я видят.
bul.building.wallbreaker.description: Изглежда като машина за събаряне. Точно така е.
bul.building.wooddoor.description: Само вие и вашите приятели можете да я отворите - другите не могат да влязат.
bul.building.woodenplate.description: Проста плоча - дъски, гвоздеи и въглен.
bul.building.woodwall.description: Не е лоша защита за начало, но гори добре.
bul.chitinbow.description: Стрелите от този арбалет пробиват дървен стълб!
bul.claws.description: Три, четири, по-добре заключете вратата си.
bul.copperthrowingknife.description: Полезен в икономиката. Може да се хвърли върху врага.
bul.cowhat.description: Кой казва "Мууууу"? Вълк в овча кожа!
bul.crowbar.description: Може да се използва за отваряне на врати!
bul.crownhat.description: С нея оръжието не се чупи повече!
bul.druidhat.description: Лесните духове изискват жертва. Вълците ще дойдат за душите на враговете ви.
bul.eaglehat.description: Ловкост като голяма птица! Намаля умората.
bul.experiencepotion.description: Позволява ви да получите повече опит!
bul.extinguisher.description: Има лесна за употреба дръжка. Гаси пожари.
bul.firepotion.description: Предпазва от огън и запалва враговете.
bul.furhat.description: Поддържа топлината по-дълго в зимния биом.
bul.gatherpotion.description: Позволява ви да събирате повече ресурси!
bul.goldenhammer.description: Най-добрият инструмент за унищожение. По-тежка глава осигурява увеличени щети.
bul.goldenhelmet.description: Позволява да не губиш предмети при смърт, ако има камък на душите.
bul.goldenshield.description: Може да помогне за оцеляване в този свят.
bul.hammer.description: Инструмент за демонтаж на сгради. Изключително мощен, но много бавен.
bul.harpoon.description: Като кука за гмуркане, но по-добре. Оръжие за смели морски ловци.
bul.heraldicshield.description: Щитът изглежда, че е принадлежал на дворянин от Гинези Каунти. Вероятно е много стар.
bul.illusionhat.description: При ниско хп те прави невидими за враговете.
bul.improvedstickypotion.description: Захваща множество врагов в капан от слиз. Трудно се измива
bul.inquisitorhat.description: Първите, които научиха как да се противопоставят на кошмарите, бяха инквизиторите. Вярно е, че след появата на Автоматичните Кукли, те бяха напуснати.
bul.invisiblepotion.description: Прави ви невидим и бавно ви убива.
bul.ironclub.description: По-добре е да не се спори с това!
bul.item_description.custom_effect_type.refl: <color=#FF00FF>Отразява част от урона обратно към врага.</color>
bul.item_description.prey.type.2: <color=#FF00FF>Добро за събиране на дърва и руда.</color>
bul.jasonhat.description: Страхотна, винтидж хокейна маска. Увеличава шанса за критичен урон.
bul.kunai.description: Позволява да се нанася щета през враговете.
bul.lamphat.description: Помага да се вижда по-добре през нощта.
bul.magichat.description: Капани в нея не са страшни!
bul.moneyhat.description: Трикратно увеличаване на падащите монети. Носете източник на богатство на главата си.
bul.monsterhunterhat.description: Шапка на ловец на чудовища. Работи на тях като сребърен меч.
bul.murderer.description: Бръснач остър. Твърде тежък за употреба с една ръка. Колко войници уби той?
bul.nightmarescythe.description: Непокойни души са затворени в острието.
bul.nightmareshield.description: Щитът излъчва ужасна аура. Дори да си близо до него е невъзможно.
bul.nightmaresuriken.description: Свистът на полета на тези ширюкени прилича на крясък.
bul.notify.coins.lock: Трябва да влезете в профила си, за да използвате монетите!
bul.notify.heartstone_destroyed: Вашият камък на сърцето е унищожен!
bul.pinkshooterhat.description: Голямо увеличаване на щетите на далекобойното оръжие.
bul.polarbowrecipe.description: Ако прочетете този рецепт, ще се отключи изработката на нов предмет.
bul.polarcoin.description: Съдържа силата на зимата, може да бъде разменено за рецепти. Пада от бели мечки. Увеличен шанс за падане с полярна кожа!
bul.polarhat.description: Зимно удобство в сърцето на снежните бури. В комбинация с полярен меч или арбалет - увеличава щетите!
bul.polarhatrecipe.description: Ако прочетете този рецепт, ще се отключи изработката на нов предмет.
bul.polarpotionrecipe.description: Ако прочетете този рецепт, ще се отключи изработката на нов предмет.
bul.polarshieldrecipe.description: Ако прочетете този рецепт, ще се отключи изработката на нов предмет.
bul.polarsword.description: Острието, покрито с инеи, е непоклатимо пред враговете.
bul.polarswordrecipe.description: Ако прочетете този рецепт, ще се отключи изработката на нов предмет.
bul.propellerhat.description: Стрелката сочи към кръгли, капани подобни обекти.
bul.pumpkinhat.description: Страхотен празничен тоалет! Може да даде бонбони!
bul.ragehat.description: Трябва да е бил носен някога от голям Церниански берсерк. Колкото по-близо е смъртта, толкова по-силни са ударите.
bul.rockethat.description: Олекотява предметите и увеличава скоростта на бягане.
bul.rubysword.description: Церемониален нож на офицерите на Танай.
bul.sonichat.description: Чим по-ниско е здравето, толкова по-бързо ще се движите.
bul.spideregg.description: Просто паячи яйца. Хвърлете ги, за да призовете паяци.
bul.spikeshield.description: Подобрен дървен щит! Покрит с шипове.
bul.staffofplague.description: Дръжката носи марката на Имперския Алхимически Гилд. Защо е тук?
bul.staminapotion.description: Позволява ви да не се уморявате толкова бързо.
bul.stickypotion.description: Зельо, сварено от ядрото на Слайм. Ужасно лепкаво!
bul.swamppotion.description: Лекува рани, но има много гадък вкус.
bul.system.secret_chest: Съкровищна кестена се появи на картата!
bul.thiefhat.description: Увеличава шанса за хакване. Прави ви невидими за кратко време.
bul.thunderwand.description: Отблъсква враговете с елементарна сила. Гръмотевична мощ в ръцете ви.
bul.timeriteshield.description: Най-добрият щит за нападение на бази!
bul.timeritesword.description: Всичко, което докосне тази острието, умира.
bul.touristhat.description: Виждаш далече, когато я носиш това!
bul.ui.building.button.lock.auth: Трябва да влезете, за да построите това!
bul.ui.dialogbox.adblock: Обнаружен блокиращ рекламите, не може да получи награда.
bul.ui.dialogbox.connection.cant_fetch_versi: Неуспешна проверка за актуалност на играта.
bul.ui.dialogbox.connection.wrong_version: Версията на клиента не е актуална, вероятно трябва да обновите играта.
bul.ui.dialogbox.placeholder.android_shop: Магазинът все още не е наличен в Android версията.
bul.ui.dialogbox.quick_auth.description: Вашият герой все още може да бъде жив на друг сървър. Можете да принудително прекратите старата сесия или да изберете друг акаунт.
bul.ui.game.exit: Сигурни ли сте, че искате да напуснете играта?
bul.ui.leaderboard.name: Име
bul.ui.login.help: Влезте със социалните мрежи, за да получите повече функционалности!
bul.ui.mainmenu.banned: Вие бяхте изключени от този сървър :(\nНе се притеснявайте, просто се свържете с друг!
bul.ui.mainmenu.lockdown: Връзката ви с този сървър е прекъсната поради:\n{0}\nНе се притеснявайте, просто се свържете с друг!
bul.ui.map.teamnavigation.hint: Кликнете върху картата, за да създадете маркировка за отбора
bul.ui.menu.exit: Сигурни ли сте, че искате да излезете към главното меню?
bul.ui.shifthintbuilding: За да построите няколко обекта, задръжте Shift.
bul.ui.shop.lock: Трябва да влезете в профила си, за да използвате монетите!
bul.ui.sure.exit: Сигурни ли сте, че искате да затворите прозореца на играта?
bul.ui.team.join: Иска да се присъедини към отбора
bul.ui.teamchat.help: Използвайте /team msg за да говорите със своите съотборници или Shift + Enter
bul.vampirehat.description: Възстановява здравето ти, когато удариш враг.
bul.vikingaxe.description: Реже от двете страни! Мощен, но бавен.
bul.woodenhammer.description: Основен инструмент за разглобяване на сгради.

deu.acidball.description: Brennende Projektile für den Säurestab, verursachen Schmerzen bei Kontakt.
deu.arrow.description: Aus Holz, mit einer scharfen Spitze.
deu.batwithnails.description: Auf dem Griff steht der Name "Lucille".
deu.bearhat.description: Geschickt aus Bärenfell gefertigt. Erhöht den Schaden.
deu.bonehat.description: Mit Schnitzereien bedeckt. Magischerweise absorbiert es einen Teil des eingehenden Schadens.
deu.boomerang.description: Sieht aus wie eine Banane. Nicht sehr einschüchternd...
deu.boostpad.description: Beschleunigt jedes bewegliche Objekt. Kann für komplexe Bewegungen verwendet werden.
deu.boxinggloves.description: Die erste Regel des Fight Clubs...
deu.building.archer.description: Ein treuer Begleiter, der auf Feinde schießt. Versorgt sich selbst mit Munition.
deu.building.archertower.description: Ein geduldiger und aufmerksamer Wächter beobachtet von innen.
deu.building.barrel.description: Hochexplosiv. Vorsicht! Keine plötzlichen Bewegungen machen!
deu.building.battery.description: Persönliches Kraftwerk. Elektrische Strukturen können damit verbunden werden.
deu.building.bonfire.description: Hergestellt aus sorgfältig ausgewählten Steinen und Baumstämmen. Hält dich im Winter warm.
deu.building.chickenfarm.description: Guter, wetterfester Hühnerstall. Vergessen Sie nicht, auf das Wachstum der Küken zu warten!
deu.building.circleofreturn.description: Verwenden Sie den Stein des Comebacks, um dorthin zurückzukehren.
deu.building.conductivefloor.description: Es kneift leicht an den Füßen, wenn man darauf steht
deu.building.coppermine.description: Baut Kupfer aus den Tiefen der Erde ab.
deu.building.deaddoorl.description: Diese Tür ist nicht die stärkste, aber ewig.
deu.building.deadwalll.description: Wände aus totem Holz haben die besondere Fähigkeit, wiederhergestellt zu werden. Als ob sie lebendig wären. Schütze sie vor Feuer!
deu.building.decorativefloor1.description: Welche Art von Basis hat keine Böden?! Verwenden Sie verschiedene Varianten, um es hübsch zu machen.
deu.building.diamonddoor.description: Sehr schön. Automatisch, wie im Supermarkt!
deu.building.diamondwall.description: Funkelt in der Sonne. Repariert sich automatisch. Robuster als Gold- oder Steinwände.
deu.building.electricspikes.description: Es ist schwer zu erkennen, wenn es ausgeschaltet ist
deu.building.electricwall.description: Möchten Sie einen elektrischen Schock erhalten?
deu.building.farm.description: Vergessen Sie nicht, auf das Wachstum der Ferkel zu warten!
deu.building.floor.description: Feinde können nicht auf deinem Boden bauen. Es sieht trotzdem gut aus.
deu.building.freezer.description: Mach die Dinge cooler! Hilft beim Abkühlen in der Wüste.
deu.building.goldendoor.description: Ein Wunderwerk mittelalterlicher Ingenieurskunst: Es kann geöffnet und geschlossen werden. Stärker als eine Holztür!
deu.building.goldmine.description: Baut langsam Gold aus tief unter der Erde ab.
deu.building.goldwall.description: Die Oberfläche ist glatt, mit einigen Unebenheiten. Stärker als Holz- oder Steinwände. Nicht brennbar.
deu.building.guard.description: Bewegt sich langsam. Schaut unter seinem Helm herum. Folgt Befehlen.
deu.building.guardarcher.description: Bewegt sich langsam. Mag es, mit seinem Bogen zu schießen und Bereiche zu bewachen. Folgt Befehlen.
deu.building.knightmannequin.description: Besondere Struktur zur Ausbildung von Söldnern.
deu.building.lamp.description: Ein seltsames, lichtproduzierendes Gerät. Schützt vor Nachtmonstern.
deu.building.mercenary.description: Folgt dir. Einer für alle und alle für einen!
deu.building.motorcyclewithcarrycot.descript: Für dich und einen Freund! Langsam, aber hat ein Beiwagen.
deu.building.phantomtower.description: Vertrauen Sie Ihre Sicherheit bösen Geistern an.
deu.building.platform.description: Stehend darauf kannst du über deine Gebäude schießen!
deu.building.policecar.description: Eigentum des Bezirks. Um Ordnung aufrechtzuerhalten!
deu.building.portal.description: Künstlich erzeugte Risse in der Materie!
deu.building.privatechest.description: Behält das, was du hineinlegst, auch wenn du das Spiel verlässt.
deu.building.repairbox.description: Repariert irgendwie Gegenstände, die hineingelegt werden.
deu.building.rockmine.description: Extrahiert langsam Steine aus der tiefen Erde.
deu.building.scooter.description: Langsam, aber schneller als zu Fuß!
deu.building.snowmobile.description: Bewegt sich schneller auf schneebedeckten Oberflächen. Sitzplätze für zwei Personen.
deu.building.trap.description: Wenn darauf getreten wird, schnappt sie zu und hält das Opfer fest. Feinde können sie nicht sehen.
deu.building.wallbreaker.description: Sieht aus wie eine Abrissmaschine. Das ist er auch.
deu.building.wooddoor.description: Nur du und deine Freunde können sie öffnen - andere können nicht hinein.
deu.building.woodenplate.description: Ein einfaches Brett - Bretter, Nägel und Holzkohle.
deu.building.woodwall.description: Keine schlechte Verteidigung, um zu beginnen, aber es brennt gut.
deu.cactushat.description: Reflektiert eine geringe Menge an Schaden.
deu.chitinbow.description: Pfeile aus dieser Armbrust durchdringen einen Baumstamm!
deu.club.description: Auf dem Griff befinden sich grobe Markierungen.
deu.copperthrowingknife.description: Nützlich in der Wirtschaft. Kann auf einen Feind geworfen werden.
deu.cowhat.description: Wer sagt "Muh"? Ein Wolf im Schafspelz.
deu.crowbar.description: Kann verwendet werden, um Türen aufzuhebeln!
deu.crownhat.description: Mit ihm bricht die Waffe nicht mehr!
deu.darkboomerang.description: Eine verbesserte Version des normalen Boomerangs.
deu.darkspear.description: Verwandelt einen feindlichen Schild in ein Nudelsieb.
deu.darkthrowingknife.description: Fliegt mit der Kraft der Nacht!
deu.druidhat.description: Die Waldgeister verlangen Opfergaben. Die Wölfe werden nach den Seelen deiner Feinde kommen.
deu.eaglehat.description: Wendigkeit wie ein großer Vogel! Reduziert Ermüdung.
deu.experiencepotion.description: Ermöglicht es dir, mehr Erfahrung zu sammeln!
deu.extinguisher.description: Hat einen einfach zu bedienenden Hebel. Löscht Brände.
deu.firepotion.description: Schützt vor Feuer und setzt Feinde in Brand.
deu.furhat.description: Hält die Wärme länger im Winterbiom.
deu.gatherpotion.description: Ermöglicht es dir, mehr Ressourcen zu sammeln!
deu.goldenhammer.description: Bestes Werkzeug für Zerstörung. Ein schwererer Kopf sorgt für erhöhten Schaden.
deu.goldenhelmet.description: Erlaubt es dir, bei Tod keine Gegenstände zu verlieren, wenn es einen Seelenstein gibt.
deu.goldenshield.description: Kann helfen, in dieser Welt zu überleben.
deu.hammer.description: Werkzeug zum Abbau von Gebäuden. Extrem leistungsstark, aber sehr langsam.
deu.happyclub.description: Einmal im Jahr und der Stock schießt.
deu.harlequinhat.description: Ertränke die Kugeln, tanze wie ein Harlekin!
deu.harpoon.description: Wie ein Enterhaken, aber besser. Eine Waffe für mutige Seejäger.
deu.heraldicshield.description: Der Schild scheint einem Adligen aus dem Landkreis Ginesi gehört zu haben. Er ist wahrscheinlich sehr alt.
deu.illusionhat.description: Bei niedrigem HP macht es dich für Feinde unsichtbar.
deu.improvedstickypotion.description: Fängt mehrere Feinde in einer Schleimfalle ein. Schwer abzuwaschen.
deu.inquisitorhat.description: Die Inquisitoren waren die ersten, die lernten, wie man Albträumen widersteht. Allerdings wurden sie nach dem Erscheinen der Automatischen Puppen aufgegeben.
deu.invisiblepotion.description: Macht dich unsichtbar und tötet dich langsam.
deu.ironclub.description: Es ist besser, damit nicht zu streiten!
deu.item_description.custom_effect_type.refl: <color=#FF00FF>Reflektiert einen Teil des Schadens zurück zum Feind.</color>
deu.item_description.custom_effect_type.shad: <color=#FF00FF>Erweckt Seelen beim Töten wieder zum Leben.</color>
deu.item_description.custom_effect_type.web_: <color=#FF00FF>Fängt den Feind in einem Netz ein.</color>
deu.item_description.prey.type.2: <color=#FF00FF>Gut zum Sammeln von Holz und Erz.</color>
deu.jasonhat.description: Großartige, vintage Eishockeymaske. Erhöht die Chance auf kritischen Schaden.
deu.kunai.description: Ermöglicht es, Schaden durch Feinde zu verursachen.
deu.lamphat.description: Hilft beim Sehen in der Nacht.
deu.lasersword.description: Vor langer Zeit, in einer weit entfernten Galaxie erschaffen...
deu.machete.description: Du siehst verrückt aus, wenn du es hältst!
deu.moneyhat.description: Dreifacher Münzwurf. Trage eine Quelle des Reichtums auf deinem Kopf.
deu.monsterhunterhat.description: Monsterjäger-Hut. Wirkt auf sie wie ein Silberschwert.
deu.murderer.description: Rasiermesserscharf. Zu schwer, um mit einer Hand zu benutzen. Wie viele Krieger hat er erschlagen?
deu.nightmarescythe.description: Rastlose Seelen sind im Schwert gefangen.
deu.nightmareshield.description: Der Schild strahlt eine schreckliche Aura aus. Selbst in seiner Nähe zu sein, ist unerträglich.
deu.nightmaresuriken.description: Das Pfeifen des Fluges dieser Shiryuken ähnelt dem Schrei einer Person.
deu.notify.coins.lock: Sie müssen sich anmelden, um Münzen zu verwenden!
deu.pinkshooterhat.description: Erhöht den Schaden von Fernkampfwaffen erheblich.
deu.polarbowrecipe.description: Wenn Sie dieses Rezept lesen, wird das Handwerk eines neuen Gegenstands geöffnet.
deu.polarcoin.description: Enthält die Kraft des Winters und kann gegen Rezepte eingetauscht werden. Es fällt von weißen Bären ab. Erhöhte Dropchance mit einem Polar-Skin!
deu.polarhat.description: Winterlicher Komfort im Herzen von Schneestürmen. In Kombination mit einem Polarschwert oder einer Armbrust - erhöht den Schaden!
deu.polarhatrecipe.description: Wenn Sie dieses Rezept lesen, wird das Handwerk eines neuen Gegenstands geöffnet.
deu.polarpotionrecipe.description: Wenn Sie dieses Rezept lesen, wird das Handwerk eines neuen Gegenstands geöffnet.
deu.polarshieldrecipe.description: Wenn Sie dieses Rezept lesen, wird das Handwerk eines neuen Gegenstands geöffnet.
deu.polarsword.description: Die Kante des Schwertes, bedeckt mit Raureif, ist unerbittlich vor den Feinden.
deu.polarswordrecipe.description: Wenn Sie dieses Rezept lesen, wird das Handwerk eines neuen Gegenstands geöffnet.
deu.propellerhat.description: Der Pfeil zeigt auf kreisförmige, falleförmige Objekte.
deu.ragehat.description: Es muss einmal von einem großen Cernianischen Berserker getragen worden sein. Je näher der Tod ist, desto stärker sind die Schläge.
deu.rockethat.description: Erleichtert Gegenstände und erhöht die Laufgeschwindigkeit.
deu.sonichat.description: Je niedriger die HP, desto höher die Laufgeschwindigkeit.
deu.spear.description: Gut für die Jagd. Ignoriert Schilde.
deu.spideregg.description: Einfach nur Spinneneier. Wirf sie, um Spinnen herbeizurufen.
deu.spiderhat.description: Halb Mensch, halb Spinne! Holt mehr Sachen heraus!
deu.staffofplague.description: Der Griff trägt das Zeichen der Kaiserlichen Alchemie-Gilde. Warum ist er hier?
deu.staminapotion.description: Ermöglicht es Ihnen, länger nicht müde zu werden.
deu.stickypotion.description: Ein Trank gebraut aus dem Kern eines Schleims. Schrecklich klebrig!
deu.swamppotion.description: Heilt Wunden, aber hat einen sehr unangenehmen Geschmack.
deu.system.secret_chest: Eine Schatztruhe ist auf der Karte erschienen!
deu.thiefhat.description: Erhöht die Chance gehackt zu werden. Macht dich für kurze Zeit unsichtbar.
deu.throwingknife.description: Sehr gut - wenn du genau bist!
deu.thunderwand.description: Stößt Feinde mit elementarer Kraft weg. Donnernde Macht in deinen Händen.
deu.timeriteshield.description: Der beste Schild für Angriffe auf Basen!
deu.timeritesword.description: Alles, was diese Klinge berührt, stirbt.
deu.touristhat.description: Du siehst weit weg, wenn du das trägst!
deu.ui.building.button.lock.auth: Du musst dich anmelden, um dies zu bauen!
deu.ui.dialogbox.adblock: AdBlocker erkannt, Belohnung durch Anzeigen nicht möglich.
deu.ui.dialogbox.connection.cant_fetch_versi: Überprüfung auf Aktualität des Spiels fehlgeschlagen.
deu.ui.dialogbox.connection.wrong_version: Die Version des Clients ist nicht auf dem neuesten Stand, du solltest das Spiel wahrscheinlich aktualisieren.
deu.ui.dialogbox.placeholder.android_shop: Der Markt ist in der Android-Version noch nicht verfügbar.
deu.ui.dialogbox.quick_auth.description: Dein Charakter kann noch auf einem anderen Server am Leben sein. Du kannst die alte Sitzung gewaltsam beenden oder ein anderes Konto wählen.
deu.ui.game.exit: Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie aufhören möchten?
deu.ui.leaderboard.name: Name
deu.ui.login.help: Melden Sie sich mit sozialen Netzwerken an, um mehr Funktionen zu erhalten!
deu.ui.mainmenu.banned: Sie wurden von diesem Server getrennt :(\nKeine Sorge, verbinden Sie sich einfach mit einem anderen!
deu.ui.mainmenu.lockdown: Sie wurden von diesem Server getrennt, weil:\n{0}\nKeine Sorge, verbinden Sie sich einfach mit einem anderen!
deu.ui.map.teamnavigation.hint: Klicken Sie auf die Karte, um ein Team-Markierung zu erstellen
deu.ui.menu.exit: Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie zum Hauptmenü zurückkehren möchten?
deu.ui.shifthintbuilding: Um mehrere Objekte zu bauen, halten Sie die Umschalttaste gedrückt.
deu.ui.shop.lock: Sie müssen sich anmelden, um Münzen zu verwenden!
deu.ui.statshouldlogin: Melden Sie sich an, um Statistiken zu sehen!
deu.ui.sure.exit: Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie das Spiel-Fenster schließen möchten?
deu.ui.teamchat.help: Verwende /team msg, um mit deinen Teamkollegen zu sprechen oder Shift + Enter
deu.vampirehat.description: Stellt deine Gesundheit wieder her, wenn du einen Feind triffst.
deu.vikingaxe.description: Schneidet auf beiden Seiten! Mächtig, aber langsam.
deu.voidspear.description: SIE erkunden die Welt durch ihn.

eng.acidball.description: Burning projectiles for the acid wand, causing pain upon contact.
eng.acidwand.description: Shoots highly corrosive acid, weakening enemies.
eng.arrow.description: Stone-tipped, pointed. Used for most crossbows.
eng.astralite.description: Sky-colored crystals. Very smooth to the touch. Fragile, do not drop!
eng.astraspear.description: A spear forged from Astralite. Deadly damage and surprising lightness do the job. However, extremely fragile.
eng.astrasword.description: Damage and low weight are the result of mastering Astralite. The flip side is the sword is extremely fragile.
eng.axepickaxe.description: Maximum efficiency! A comfortable handle and an ultra-durable tip allow you to mine absolutely any resource!
eng.baseballhat.description: Reduces overheating rate. Exploring the desert is now much more comfortable!
eng.battlefan.description: Blows away the tower with the wind, along with all projectiles!
eng.batwithnails.description: Inscribed on the handle is the name "Lucille".
eng.bearhat.description: Skillfully made from a bear hide. Increases damage.
eng.blackfern.description: Used for brewing potions. A highly interesting and curious plant! No other uses have been found yet.
eng.bone.description: A very durable material. Widely available and can be found in every corner of the world!
eng.bonehat.description: Covered in carvings. Magically, it absorbs part of incoming damage.
eng.boomerang.description: Looks like a banana. Not very intimidating...
eng.boostpad.description: Accelerates any moveable object. Can be used for complex movement.
eng.boxinggloves.description: The first rule of fight club...
eng.bronzecrate.description: This crate can only be opened with a bronze key!
eng.bronzekey.description: This key can open a bronze crate.
eng.buffalohat.description: Allows you to run faster in a straight line.
eng.building.archer.description: A loyal companion, shoots at enemies. Provides ammunition for itself.
eng.building.archertower.description: A patient and attentive guard watches from inside.
eng.building.barrel.description: Highly explosive. Watch out! Don't make any sudden movements!
eng.building.battery.description: Personal power plant. Electrical structures can be connected to it.
eng.building.bonfire.description: Made of carefully selected rocks and logs. Warms you up in the winter.
eng.building.cactuswall.description: Dangerous, as a cactus! Subject to combustion.
eng.building.chickenfarm.description: Good, all-weather chicken coop. Don't forget to wait for the chicks to grow up!
eng.building.circleofreturn.description: Use Stone of Comeback to teleport back to it.
eng.building.conductivefloor.description: Slightly pinches your feet when you stand on it
eng.building.coppermine.description: Mines copper from the bowels of the earth.
eng.building.daemonmotorcycle.description: Rumbles through the night, inaccessible to mere mortals.
eng.building.deaddoorl.description: This door is not the strongest, but eternal.
eng.building.deadwalll.description: Dead wood walls have a special ability to be restored. As if they were alive. Protect them from fire!
eng.building.deadwoodspikes.description: Unlike regular spikes, these ones regenerate excellently! Moreover, they are much more durable.
eng.building.decorativefloor1.description: What kind of base doesn't have floors?! Use different varients to make it pretty.
eng.building.diamonddoor.description: Very beautiful. Automatic, like at a supermarket!
eng.building.diamondwall.description: Sparkles in the sun. Repairs itself automatically. More durable than gold or stone walls.
eng.building.electricspikes.description: It's hard to see it on the ground while it's off
eng.building.electricwall.description: Want to receive some electric shock?
eng.building.farm.description: Don't forget to wait for the piglets to grow up!
eng.building.floor.description: Enemies can't build on your floors. It looks good, anyway.
eng.building.freezer.description: Make things cooler around! Helps to cool off in the desert.
eng.building.goldendoor.description: A marvel of medieval engineering: it can open and close. Stronger than a wooden door!
eng.building.goldmine.description: Slowly mines gold ore from deep underground.
eng.building.goldwall.description: The surface is smooth, with some bumps. Stronger than wooden or stone walls. Not flammable.
eng.building.guard.description: Moves slowly. Looks around from under its helmet. Follows commands.
eng.building.guardarcher.description: Moves slowly. Likes shooting its bow and guarding areas. Follows commands.
eng.building.halloweencar.description: A car for lonely rich people!
eng.building.heartstone.description: Gives one more life to you.
eng.building.icewall.description: Very sturdy. Avoid licking or heating it!
eng.building.lamp.description: A strange, light-producing device. Protects from night monsters.
eng.building.mercenary.description: Follows you. One for all and all for one!
eng.building.minefire.description: Explodes, creating a circle of fire that damages and ignites everything around.
eng.building.mineice.description: Instantly freezes the area around it, slowing or stopping enemies temporarily.
eng.building.minesmoke.description: Releases thick smoke, concealing movements and positions. Enemies lose orientation.
eng.building.minesticky.description: Upon explosion, covers the ground with a sticky substance, significantly slowing anyone who passes over it.
eng.building.minetoxic.description: Spreads toxic gas that slowly inflicts damage and weakens enemies.
eng.building.motorcyclewithcarrycot.descript: For you and a friend! Slow, but has a sidecar.
eng.building.phantomtower.description: Trust your safety to evil spirits.
eng.building.platform.description: Standing on it, you can shoot over your buildings!
eng.building.policecar.description: Property of the county district. To mantain order!
eng.building.premiumdoor.description: The result of technological advancements. Opens without a single creak.
eng.building.premiumwall.description: The result of technological advancements, high quality and reliability guarantee first-class protection for your fortress.
eng.building.privatechest.description: Will keep what you put into it, even if you leave the game.
eng.building.repairbox.description: Repairs items put into it, somehow.
eng.building.rockmine.description: Slowly extracts stone from deep underground.
eng.building.rockwall.description: More durable than wooden walls. Doesn't burn.
eng.building.sleigh.description: Time to slide down the hill!
eng.building.smelter.description: Marks your transition to the newest and most powerful technologies! Built from the most heat-resistant materials.
eng.building.snowmobile.description: Moves faster on snowy surfaces. Seats two.
eng.building.timeritedoor.description: A door made from refined Timerite. Even opens with an extremely heavy sound. Extremely sturdy.
eng.building.timeritewall.description: A wall made from refined Timerite. Incredibly durable.
eng.building.trap.description: Sprung when stepped on, it holds the victim in place. Enemies can't see it.
eng.building.vacuumchest.description: A universal storage unit that automatically collects resources and items around it. Reliable and modern. Powered by electricity.
eng.building.wallbreaker.description: Looks like a demolition machine. He is.
eng.building.wooddoor.description: Only you and your friends can open it - others can't get in.
eng.building.woodenplate.description: A simple plate - planks, nails and charcoal.
eng.building.woodwall.description: Not a bad defense to start with, but it burns well.
eng.cactus.description: Soft on the inside but hard and spiky on the outside. No wonder all cactus-based items have inherited its ability to reflect damage.
eng.cactushat.description: Protects you from the desert heat and pricks anyone who strikes you. Explore the desert with spiky protection!
eng.cactushookrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the crafting of a new item will be unlocked.
eng.cactuspotion.description: It quenches thirst and cools in the heat. Simply put, it prevents overheating in the sun. Surprisingly, it tastes like cactus...
eng.cactuspotionrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the crafting of a new item will be unlocked.
eng.cactusshieldrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the crafting of a new item will be unlocked.
eng.cactusspikepotion.description: Covers with thorns that injure all attackers.
eng.cactusswordrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the crafting of a new item will be unlocked.
eng.chitin.description: A light yet surprisingly durable material. Used for crafting advanced items.
eng.chitinbow.description: Arrows from this crossbow pierce through even the thickest tree trunk!
eng.christmascoinblue.description: Very fragile, so you need to fold it carefully. You can exchange it for unique items.
eng.christmascoingreen.description: Very fragile, so you need to fold it carefully. You can exchange it for unique items.
eng.christmascoinred.description: Very fragile, so you need to fold it carefully. You can exchange it for unique items.
eng.christmashat.description: Hides from enemies on the mini-map and creates a festive mood. Gives special power to snowballs!
eng.christmashatrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.christmaspotionrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.christmasshieldrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.christmaswand.description: A staff that shoots freezing snowballs. A new era in snowball fights.
eng.christmaswandrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.claws.description: Three, four, better lock your door.
eng.club.description: On the handle are crude markings.
eng.copperore.description: A useful resource! Now you can upgrade your tools!
eng.coppershield.description: A shield with a thousand years of history.
eng.copperthrowingknife.description: Useful in the economy. Can be thrown at an enemy.
eng.cowhat.description: Who says "Mooooooo"? A wolf in sheep's clothing.
eng.crowbar.description: Can be used to pry open doors!
eng.crownhat.description: With it, the weapon does not break longer!
eng.crystalthreads.description: Threads skillfully made from crystals. Very thin, yet strong.
eng.daemonpotion.description: Grants incredible resistance to environmental factors.
eng.daemonsword.description: The fiery blade capable of incinerating souls.
eng.darkboomerang.description: An improved version of the normal boomerang.
eng.darkmatter.description: What a spawn of darkness leaves behind after its demise. One thing is certain – this resource is extremely valuable.
eng.darkspear.description: Turns an enemy shield into a colander.
eng.darkthrowingknife.description: Flies with the power of the night!
eng.deadlog.description: Strange purple resin seeps from the cracks, healing all damage within minutes. An extremely unusual resource with limited uses.
eng.deathshield.description: Looks intimidating. Once a legendary shield.
eng.diamond.description: Crystals are found only in snowy regions. An extremely useful and essential resource. Durable walls, powerful weapons, and the latest technology! Isn't that awesome?
eng.disguisehat.description: Perfect for hide-and-seek! Conceals you on the map and makes you invisible for 15 seconds.
eng.druidhat.description: Forest spirits require sacrifice. The wolves will come for the souls of your enemies.
eng.dust.description: Mainly used for items with a fiery touch! At night, you can notice the dust starting to glow slightly.
eng.eaglehat.description: Agility like a big bird! Reduces fatigue.
eng.experiencepotion.description: Allows you to get more experience!
eng.extinguisher.description: Has an easy-to-use lever. Extinguishes fires.
eng.feather.description: Needed for everything that uses arrows! In extreme cases, you can tickle your opponent with them.
eng.fireball.description: Ammunition for Fire Shooter 3000. Blazing hot, capable of burning through even the strongest wood!
eng.firepotion.description: Protects from fire and sets enemies on fire.
eng.flowercactushat.description: Spiky and protects against heat. With a cute flower on top.
eng.flowercactushatrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the crafting of a new item will be unlocked.
eng.fur.description: Not the rarest, but still a quite essential resource. Pleasant to the touch.
eng.furhat.description: Keeps heat longer in the winter biome.
eng.gatherpotion.description: Allows you to gather more resources!
eng.ghostthread.description: A very rare and extremely expensive resource, despite low demand. It glows suspiciously at night. Semi-transparent!
eng.goldenbow.description: Durable stock, with a strong string.
eng.goldencrate.description: This crate can only be opened with a golden key!
eng.goldenhammer.description: Best tool for destruction. A heavier head provides increased damage.
eng.goldenhelmet.description: Allows you to not lose objects at death, if there is a stone of souls.
eng.goldenkey.description: You can open a gold crate with this key.
eng.goldenpickaxe.description: A bit heavy, but very good.
eng.goldenshield.description: Can help to survive in this world.
eng.goldenspear.description: The favored weapon of the Mussuri mercenaries.
eng.goldore.description: One of the most valuable and essential resources! A new era in weaponry and construction!
eng.grenadefire.description: Emits waves of fire, damaging and setting enemies ablaze around the explosion site.
eng.grenadeice.description: Releases intense cold upon detonation, instantly freezing nearby ground and slowing all within the blast radius.
eng.grenadesmoke.description: Creates a dense smoke screen that masks movements and impedes visual detection.
eng.grenadesticky.description: Sticks to surfaces and upon detonation, coats the area with a sticky substance, significantly slowing enemy movements.
eng.grenadetoxic.description: Scatters clouds of toxic gas that slowly deplete health and weaken enemies in the affected area.
eng.halloweencarrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.halloweencoin.description: Evil lurks within it, you can exchange it for recipes. Increased drop rate with Halloween skins!
eng.halloweenhat.description: Doubles the resources gathered from veins! Perfect for those who love building large bases.
eng.halloweenhatrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.halloweenpotion.description: Mixed under artisanal conditions, the effect is unpredictable!
eng.halloweenpotionrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.halloweenshield.description: The power of the fallen will save you!
eng.halloweenshieldrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.halloweensword.description: You can both fly and fight!
eng.halloweenswordrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.hammer.description: Tool for dismantling buildings. Extremely powerful, but very slow.
eng.happyclub.description: Once a year and the stick shoots.
eng.harlequinhat.description: Drown the bullets, dance like an harlequin!
eng.harpoon.description: Like a grappling hook, but better. A weapon for brave sea hunters.
eng.healwand.description: Heal for you and your team!
eng.heraldicshield.description: The shield appears to have belonged to a nobleman from Ginesi County. He is probably very old.
eng.holidaycrate.description: You need scissors to open it!
eng.icespear.description: When it comes into contact, it encases the enemy in a powerful icy crust.
eng.illusionhat.description: At low health, it makes you invisible and invincible for a short time, giving you a chance to survive!
eng.improvedstickypotion.description: Covers a crowd of enemies in sticky slime. Hard to wash off, scrape off, or break free from, causing all sorts of inconveniences. Not recommended to throw near friends!
eng.infecteddiamond.description: A crystal that has lain deep in the swamps for a long time. Extremely radioactive!
eng.inquisitorhat.description: The first to learn how to resist nightmares were the Inquisitors. True, after the appearance of Automatic Dolls, they were abandoned.
eng.invisiblepotion.description: Turns you invisible and slowly kills you.
eng.iodinepotion.description: Protects against poisoning in the swamp.
eng.ironclub.description: It's better not to argue with this!
eng.item_description.custom_effect_type.refl: <color=#FF00FF>Reflects part of the damage back to the enemy.</color>
eng.jasonhat.description: Great, vintage hockey mask. Increases the chance of critical damage.
eng.kunai.description: So sharp, they pierce through your enemies.
eng.lamphat.description: It provides better visibility at night. And best of all — it helps keep unwanted nighttime visitors at bay...
eng.lasersword.description: Created a long time ago, in a galaxy far far away...
eng.lightball.description: A projectile for a light wand, if you look at it for a long time, your eyes will hurt.
eng.log.description: A simple log. It will help you start surviving in this harsh world. Additionally, it serves as fuel for campfires and furnaces.
eng.mace.description: It just knocks you off your feet!
eng.magicball.description: An extremely powerful magical charge. Pierces even the strongest shields.
eng.magichat.description: Traps in it are not terrible!
eng.magicwand.description: It breathes of an icy spruce forest. Incredible power! Filled with magic and an unforgettable Christmas spirit.
eng.meat.description: You can't cook it, but you can hire a guard!
eng.moneyhat.description: Triples coin drop. Wear a source of wealth on your head.
eng.monsterhunterhat.description: Monster Hunter Hat. Works on them like a silver sword.
eng.moonward.description: The power of the moon at the end of a wooden stick!
eng.murderer.description: Razor sharp. Too heavy to use with one hand. How many warriors did he slay?
eng.nightmarescythe.description: An extremely deadly and mysterious weapon. Where it came from—no one knows. All that is known is...
eng.nightmareshield.description: The shield exudes a terrible aura. Even being near him is unbearable.
eng.nightmaresuriken.description: The whistle of the flight of these shiryukens is similar to someone's scream.
eng.notify.coins.lock: You need to log in to use coins!
eng.oil.description: A terribly sticky slime goo. Smells like... pears?! Just like jelly!
eng.phantombow.description: One of the rarest weapons, with an unknown origin. Arrows simply pass through your enemies!
eng.pickaxe.description: With each strike, the tip cracks more and more! But it's still better than breaking stone with your hands.
eng.pinkshooterhat.description: Greatly increases the damage of ranged weapons.
eng.polarbombpotion.description: Freezing enemies within a radius of action!
eng.polarbombpotionrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.polarbowrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.polarcoin.description: Contains the force of winter, can be exchanged for recipes. It falls out of white bears. An increased drop with a Polar Skin!
eng.polarhat.description: Winter comfort in the heart of snowstorms. In combination with a polar sword or crossbow - increases damage!
eng.polarhatrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.polarpotion.description: Increases the damage of long-range weapons!
eng.polarpotionrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.polarshieldrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.polarswordrecipe.description: If you read this recipe, the craft of a new item will open.
eng.powder.description: Burns great! It will help you stay warm if there's no campfire nearby!
eng.premiumbow.description: A result of technological advancements, its high quality and low cost of production make this crossbow the most popular.
eng.premiumcharmofreturn.description: A very useful item. Teleports you to the return circle in just 4 seconds.
eng.premiumcrowbar.description: Breaking into doors and stealing from chests reach a new level.
eng.propellerhat.description: The arrow points to circular, trap-shaped objects.
eng.pumpkinhat.description: Great holiday outfit! Can give candy!

eng.quests.bighunt_1_1.description: Fighters! The time has come for the <color=yellow>Great Hunt!</color> The most dangerous creatures are destroying entire kingdoms right now! They must be stopped. To successfully defend against them, you need to obtain <color=green>1 Monster Hunter Hat</color>.\n<color=green>Obtained: {current_count}/{count}</color>.\nYou can acquire this item by purchasing it from the shop.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_10.description: It’s time for a Royal Hunt! You now need to eliminate <color=green>2 spider queens</color>.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_11.description: Now you need to head to the <color=#41810b>swamps</color> and eliminate <color=green>30 phytosaurs.</color> They mostly reside on the edges of the swamps.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_12.description: The hunt continues! Now you need to eliminate <color=green>40 slimes</color>.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_14.description: The penultimate task! You must eliminate the most dangerous inhabitants of the swamps. Destroy <color=green>25 chimeras</color>.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_15.description: Final task! Now, wait for <color=#001dba>night</color> and destroy <color=red>10 nightmares</color>. \n<color=black>Destroyed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_2.description: Now, head to the <color=yellow>Forest Biome</color> and eliminate a large pack of <color=yellow>50 wolves</color>. Against forest wolves, <color=yellow>any weapon</color> will be effective.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_3.description: Now you need to eliminate <color=green>50 turtles</color>. They are terrorizing the residents of the <color=yellow>desert</color>. But there’s no need to fear just yet. Turtles are vulnerable to <color=yellow>any type of weapon</color>.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_4.description: <color=red>Demonic Bulls</color>, dwelling in the deepest parts of the <color=yellow>desert</color>, are not the weakest opponents. Against them, any <color=yellow>powerful</color> or <color=yellow>long-range</color> weapon will be effective. Eliminate <color=green>40 skeletons</color>.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_5.description: You now need to eliminate <color=green>55 red spiders</color>.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_6.description: Now, eliminate <color=green>15 bulls</color>. But be careful! Their favorite attack is a charge that instantly destroys any structure.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_7.description: Now you need to head to the <color=#209bed>winter biome</color> and eliminate <color=green>40 werewolves</color>. \n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.bighunt_1_8.description: Raising the stakes! Begin the hunt for <color=green>25 polar bears</color>. It’s best to fight such an opponent from a distance.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.birthday_1.description: The game is celebrating its birthday – 7 years of the game! Your first holiday task is: \<color=green>spend 500 coins</color> in the shop. \n<color=green>Coins spent: {current\_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_2.description: The next holiday task is to \<color=green>chop down 10 trees</color>.\n\<color=green>Trees chopped: {current\_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_3.description: It's building time! <color=green>Build 70 golden walls</color>.\n<color=green>Walls built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_4.description: Let's head to Winter! <color=green>Break 10 crystals</color>.\n<color=green>Crystals broken: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_5.description: Now you need to equip a <color=yellow>basic club</color> and use it to <color=green>kill 10 forest wolves</color>.\n<color=green>Wolves killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_6.description: Begin crafting what was once the most popular shield model. Create <color=green>1 Dark Shield</color>.\n<color=green>Shields crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_7.description: For fast travel, you need to <color=green>build 1 Iron Horse</color>.\n<color=green>Motorcycles built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_8.description: It's loot time! Let's find <color=green>1 basic frying pan</color>.\n<color=green>Pans collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_9.description: High-difficulty task! You need to <color=green>accumulate 300k points</color>.\n<color=green>Points accumulated: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_game_1.desc: <color=#ea349c>Big Quest!</color>\n It’s time for a grand hunt! Defeat <color=green>300 brown bears</color>\n<color=green>Bears defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_game_2.desc: <color=#ea349c>Big Quest!</color>\n Mega Shopping! Spend <color=green>10k coins</color> in the shop!\n<color=green>Coins spent: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_game_4.desc: <color=#ea349c>Big Quest!</color>\n Gold Rush: Gather <color=green>50k gold</color>!\n<color=green>Gold gathered: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.birthday_game_5.desc: <color=#ea349c>Big Quest!</color>\n Time for a grand construction! Build <color=green>500 floor tiles</color>!\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>

eng.quests.christmas_1: Christmas! It's time to party! Try to defeat the <color=green>2 green gnomes</color>. But be careful, <color=yellow>don't let them get too close!</color> It's best to use <color=yellow>ranged weapons against them.</color><color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_1_1: Christmas! It's time to party! Try to defeat the <color=green>2 red gnomes</color>. But be careful, <color=yellow>don't let them get too close!</color> It's best to use <color=yellow>ranged weapons</color> against them.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_1_2: Christmas! It's time to party! Try to defeat the <color=green>2 purple gnomes</color>. But be careful, <color=yellow>don't let them get too close!</color> It's best to use <color=yellow>ranged weapons</color> against them.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_2: Now, let's build a Christmas tree to triple the holiday spirit! Build <color=green>1 decorative Christmas tree</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_2_1: Now let's decorate our house with a Christmas floor. Build <color=green>15 Christmas floors with reindeer</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_2_2: Now let's decorate our house with a Christmas floor. Build <color=green>15 Christmas snowflake floors</color>.\n<color=green>Builded: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_2_3: Now let's decorate our house with a Christmas floor. Build <color=green>15 Christmas floors with Santa</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_2_4: Now let's decorate our house with a Christmas floor. Build <color=green>15 Christmas Candy Cane Floors</color>.\n<color=green>Builded: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_3: Let's hunt <color=#dd7b38>Christmas Reindeer</color>! In addition to <color=#d914c9>decorations</color> needed for crafting, they also drop ammunition for your magic staff. Defeat <color=green>10 Christmas Reindeer</color>.\n<color=green>Reindeer defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_4: Want to go sledding? Find a nice hill and build a <color=green>festive sleigh</color>.\n<color=green>Sleighs built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_5: Now, let's get festive! Create <color=green>1 Christmas tree hat</color>. \n<color=green>Hats created: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_5_1: Let’s keep dressing up! Craft a <color=green>Christmas Shield</color>.\n<color=green>Shields crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.christmas_5_2: Let’s keep dressing up! Craft a <color=green>Christmas Snow Staff</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.christmas_5_3: Let’s keep gearing up! Craft <color=green>several Christmas potions</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.christmas_5_4: Let’s keep gearing up! Craft an <color=green>Ice Spear</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.christmas_6: It's time to take your gifts by force. Defeat <color=green>Santa</color>.\n<color=green>Santa defeated:{current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_longquest_1: It's time for some festive madness! Defeat <color=#dd7b38>500 Christmas Reindeer</color> and earn <color=red>big rewards</color>!\n<color=green>Christmas Reindeer Defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_longquest_2: Even crazier! Defeat <color=red>25 Santas</color> and get the top reward!\n<color=green>Santas defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.christmas_longquest_3: Kill <color=green>200 spiders</color> using the <color=yellow>Ice Spear</color>.\n<color=green>Spiders killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>

eng.quests.funny_day_2.description: Shopping Time! Spend 1000 <color=green>coins</color> in the store! Hurry up! \n<color=green>Spent: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.funny_day_3.description: Machete Kills! Kill 10 <color=green>werewolves</color> using only a machete! Hurry up! \n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>

eng.quests.halloween_tutor_1.description: ITS SPOOKY MONTH!11! To kick off the fun, you need to build <color=green>1 soul stone</color> and wait for <color=#7c3dc5>night</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_11.description: Let’s make resource gathering easier. Craft <color=green>1 witch hat</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_12.description: Grab your hammer! You need to <color=green>break 40 pumpkin lamps</color>.\n<color=green>Pumpkins broken:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_14.description: Shopping time! <color=green>Spend 1000 coins</color> in the shop.\n<color=green>Coins spent:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_15.description: Let the hunt begin! Destroy <color=green>50 bats</color> using the <color=yellow>Timerite spear</color>.\n<color=green>Bats killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_17.description: Choose the sharpest scythe and go! Kill <color=green>10 phytosaurs</color> <color=yellow>using the Scythe</color>.\n<color=green>Killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_18.description: Let’s pick an outfit for the season. Craft <color=green>1 Halloween Shield</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_19.description: Keep strengthening the festive spirit! Build <color=green>30 Halloween floor tiles with lamps</color>.\n<color=green>Built:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_2.description: And now let's find out what candy zombies are stuffed with! Kill <color=green>2 Zombies</color>. But be careful, <color=red>zombies</color> are quite strong opponents.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_20.description: Final stage! Now you must kill <color=green>150 zombies</color> <color=yellow>using the Spider Sword</color>.\n<color=green>Killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_3.description: As you've noticed, zombies drop candy, watermelons, and most importantly - <color=yellow>coins</color>, which can be used to craft a unique item scroll. Let's gather <color=green>50 Helloween Coins</color>.\n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_4.description: You can craft several items from candy and pumpkins in the crafting tab. Now, try to create <color=green>3 Halloween brooms</color>.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_5.description: Collect candies and build <color=green>15 floor tiles with a pumpkin pattern</color>.\n<color=green>Built:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_6.description: Arm yourself with the Broom and <color=green>destroy 20 spiders</color> <color=yellow>using the broom</color>.\n<color=green>Killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_7.description: It’s decoration time! Build <color=green>5 pumpkin lamps</color> at your base.\n<color=green>Built:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.halloween_tutor_9.description: Love speed? Then you need to build <color=green>1 Halloween vehicle</color>.\n<color=green>Built:{current_count}/{count}</color>

eng.quests.tutorial_1_1.description: <color=green>Logs</color> is a very useful material. You can harvest it with an <color=green>axe</color> or even with your bare hands! Try gathering 10 pieces of wood. \n<color=green>Gathered: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_10.description: Use the crafted <color=green>club</color> or any other weapon to kill five <color=green>black spiders</color>! They provide useful ingredients, and killing monsters, you level up!\n<color=green>Spiders killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_100.description: Now let’s learn potion brewing! Gather the necessary ingredients and craft <color=green>3 health potions</color>. A health potion instantly restores part of your health.\n<color=green>Potions brewed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_101.description: It’s time to craft our main weapon against enemies — the <color=#ef724e>Chitin Crossbow</color>. High damage and accuracy guaranteed! Craft <color=green>1 Chitin Crossbow</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_102.description: Let’s not forget about defense. The <color=#ef724e>Chitin Shield</color> is very light and durable. Craft <color=green>1 Chitin Shield</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_103.description: Let’s test our new crossbow! Defeat <color=green>3 Swamp Worms</color> <color=yellow>using the Chitin Crossbow</color>.\n<color=green>Worms defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_104.description: Let’s meet the most dangerous inhabitant of the swamps — the <color=#6fa8dc>Chimera</color>. These are very fast and deadly creatures. Try to defeat <color=green>1 Chimera</color>. The Chimera looks like a blue lizard.\n<color=green>Chimeras defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_105.description: Let’s upgrade our arsenal! The Timerite Spear is one of the best — extremely reliable and easy to use. Craft <color=green>1 Timerite Spear</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_106.description: Let’s test it out! Defeat <color=green>5 slimes</color> <color=yellow>using the Timerite Spear</color>.\n<color=green>Slimes killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_107.description: The perfect way to stop an enemy is to trap them with sticky slime. The <color=#66e92c>Sticky Potion</color> will help you with that. Brew <color=green>6 Sticky Potions</color>.\n<color=green>Potions brewed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_108.description: Spend <color=green>500 coins</color> by purchasing <color=#3ea152>Nightmare Shurikens</color> and something else — for example, 2 bronze keys.\n<color=green>Coins spent: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_109.description: <color=#3ea152>Nightmare Shurikens</color> deal <color=yellow>high damage</color> and can be thrown very frequently. Try to defeat <color=green>1 Chimera</color> using the <color=yellow>Nightmare Shurikens</color>.\n<color=green>Chimeras killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_11.description: Most animals drop <color=green>meat</color>. Let's gather it for the construction of a personal unit.\n<color=green>Gathered: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_110.description: Now you need to gain <color=green>50,000 experience</color>.\n<color=green>Experience gained: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_111.description: To gain experience three times faster, you can craft a <color=green>hat of one cool character</color> — what a name! \n<color=green>Hats crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_112.description: Time to upgrade our base! Gather deadwood and build <color=green>25 dead walls</color>. In terms of durability, these walls rival golden ones, and they regenerate very quickly!!!\n<color=green>Walls built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_114.description:
Let’s take a walk through the swamps. Try to defeat <color=green>10 Phytosaurs</color>. They usually live on the borders between the swamp and other biomes. They’re easy to recognize — they’re covered in moss and pumpkins.  
<color=green>Phytosaurs defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_115.description:
Now let’s meet another dangerous enemy — the Swamp Phantom! Try to defeat <color=green>1 ghost</color>. But be careful! Ranged weapons are useless against it, and you take damage just by being near it.  
<color=green>Phantoms defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_116.description: Receive your laser as a reward! Ready to test it out? Let’s go. The <color=#ff3628>Laser Sword</color> is a powerful weapon with high damage. Try to defeat <color=green>6 slimes</color> <color=yellow>using the laser</color>.\n<color=green>Slimes killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_117.description: The <color=#ff3628>Laser Sword</color> can even set enemies on fire. Try to defeat <color=green>5 swamp fish-monsters</color> <color=yellow>using the laser</color>.\n<color=green>Monsters killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_118.description: The <color=#ff3628>Laser Sword</color> can also deflect arrows and firearm projectiles. Try to defeat <color=green>20 bats</color> <color=yellow>using the laser</color>.\n<color=green>Bats killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_119.description: And... the finale! Try to defeat <color=green>10 werewolves</color> <color=yellow>using the laser</color>.\n<color=green>Werewolves killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_12.description: Open the construction menu on the units tab. Let's create a simple <color=green>knight</color>.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_120.description: Now let’s build <color=green>30 dead spikes</color> on our base. Dead spikes are much stronger than regular ones and regenerate quickly too!\n<color=green>Spikes built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_121.description: Now, try to collect <color=green>20 phantom threads</color>. Yes, they drop from phantoms.\n<color=green>Threads collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_122.description: Phantom Towers are the most powerful defensive structures in the game. To maximize your base's security, build <color=green>2 Phantom Towers</color>.\n<color=green>Towers built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_123.description: Hire <color=green>1 Demolisher</color>. This mercenary has very strong defense and deals massive damage to structures.\n<color=green>Hired: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_125.description: It's time to craft a very powerful shield — the <color=#c5a6a6>Herald Shield</color>. While heavy, it offers excellent protection. Craft <color=green>1 Herald Shield</color>.\n<color=green>Shields crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_126.description: Time for some high-tech action! Build <color=green>1 Vacuum Chest</color>. Whoa! It automatically collects all nearby items! <color=yellow>Just don’t forget to connect it to a power source</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_127.description: It’s time for new technologies! Build <color=green>1 smeltery</color>. With it, you can smelt ore and some other resources.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_128.description: The strongest walls! Tougher than most treasures. Build <color=green>4 timerite walls</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_129.description: The most reliable and sturdy doors. Let’s reinforce the base. Build <color=green>1 timerite door</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_13.description: It's very hot in the desert biome! To stay there longer, you need to craft a <color=green>cap</color>.\n<color=green>Caps crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_14.description: In the desert biome, you can find a unique resource - cactus. Let's gather 20 <color=green>cacti</color>. Cacti gathered: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_15.description: Some walls have a special effect. For instance, a cactus wall inflicts damage on the enemy if they approach too close. Let's build 2 <color=green>cactus walls</color>.\n<color=green>Cactus walls built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_16.description: Traps built by you can only be seen by you. Anyone who falls into them won't be able to get out until they destroy the trap. Build <color=green>traps</color> and lure an animal into them. Traps built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_17.description: The "Dust" resource is quite useful and necessary. It is obtained from animals that fire projectiles, like bats for example. Try to kill 2 <color=green>bats</color>, taking into account their unique attack pattern. \n<color=green>Bats killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_18.description: Different opponents give different amounts of experience. Let's kill 2 <color=green>wolves</color> and see how much experience is credited.\n<color=green>Wolves killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_19.description: Different opponents give different amounts of experience. Let's kill 1 <color=green>turtle</color> and see how much experience is credited. Hint, turtles are found in the desert.\n<color=green>Turtles killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_2.description: Now try gathering <color=green>rock</color>! You can find it in the forest. \n<color=green>Gathered: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_20.description: Some weapons have their own features, like the katana. Create a <color=green>katana</color> and test it in battle.\n<color=green>Katanas created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_21.description: Each biome has its special ore. For instance, in the desert, it's gold. Try mining some <color=green>gold</color>!\n<color=green>Gold mined: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_22.description: We already learned that cobweb drops from spiders. Let's gather some more <color=green>cobweb</color>!\n<color=green>Cobweb gathered: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_23.description: To move faster on the map, you can use transportation. Let's build a <color=green>scooter</color>.\n<color=green>Scooters built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_24.description: For effective protection of the base from mobs and other players, it's useful to use towers. Let's build a <color=green>stone tower</color>.\n<color=green>Stone towers built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_25.description: Ore can be mined not only from veins. Let's build a <color=green>gold mine</color> to have gold accessible at the base.\n<color=green>Gold mines built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_26.description: Walls vary in durability. For example, gold walls are stronger than stone and wooden ones. Let's build 20 <color=green>gold walls</color> around the base.\n<color=green>Gold walls built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_28.description: To complete this quest you need to kill 2 <color=green>black spiders</color> using only your fists!\n<color=green>Spiders killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_29.description: The "Dust" resource is quite useful and needed. It is obtained from animals that shoot fire projectiles. For example, red spiders. Try killing 2 <color=green>red spiders</color>, taking into account their attack feature.\n<color=green>Red spiders killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_3.description: <color=green>Rock</color> and <color=green>Logs</color> are used to craft a <color=green>stone axe</color>. Open the crafting menu and craft your first item! You can also craft anything you see in the menu by gathering various ingredients on the map!\n<color=green>Axes crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_30.description: Different opponents give different amounts of experience. Let's kill 5 <color=green>boars</color> and see how much experience is credited.\n<color=green>Boars killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_31.description: Different opponents give different amounts of experience. Let's kill 2 <color=green>bears</color> and see how much experience is credited.\n<color=green>Bears killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_32.description: In the winter biome, you can find a unique resource - crystal. Let's gather 50 <color=green>crystals</color>.\n<color=green>Crystals gathered: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_33.description: The higher the weapon's unlocking level, the more damage it can deal. Create a <color=green>golden sword</color> and test it in battle.\n<color=green>Golden swords created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_34.description: All hats have their own features. Create a cactus cap and test it in battle.\n<color=green>Cactus caps created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_35.description: Potions are one-time items that can apply buffs to the character or debuffs to enemies. Create a <color=green>fern potion</color>, it will be useful for exploring the swamp biome.\n<color=green>Potions created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_36.description: Each biome has its special ore. In the swamps, it's timerite. Try mining some <color=green>timerite</color>!\n<color=green>Timerite mined: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_37.description: Different opponents give different amounts of experience. Let's kill 2 <color=green>werewolves</color> and see how much experience is credited.\n<color=green>Werewolves killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_37_1.description: Now it's time to test the <color=yellow>new weapon</color>! The <color=#ff7200>Funeral Axe</color> is renowned for its durability, and cheap repairs. Try killing <color=green>6 forest wolves</color> <color=yellow>using the Funeral Axe</color>.\n<color=green>Wolves killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_37_2.description: Additionally, the <color=#ff7200>Funeral Axe</color> boasts a <color=#ff7474>high</color> damage stat. Now, try defeating <color=green>3 brown bears</color>. \n<color=green>Bears killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_37_3.description: And finally, let’s test the <color=#ff7200>Funeral Axe</color> on real players. Try to defeat <color=green>2 players</color>. \n<color=green>Players defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_38.description: The "Dark Matter" resource is very rare. It's obtained from shadows and nightmares that come at night. Try to gather 30 units of <color=green>dark matter</color>.\n<color=green>Dark matter gathered: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_39.description: Coins in the game are needed for making purchases in the shop and for repairing weapons. Try spending 30 <color=green>coins</color> in the shop.\n<color=green>Coins spent : {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_4.description: Now gather the resources for a <color=green>stone pickaxe</color> yourself and make it!\n<color=green>Pickaxes crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_40.description: Different opponents give different amounts of experience. Let's kill 1 <color=green>Green Slime</color> and see how much experience is credited.\n<color=green>Killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_41.description: Different opponents give different amounts of experience. Let's kill 1 <color=green>Swamp Monster</color>, and see how much experience is credited. Hint, it resembles a cross between a fish and a crab.\n<color=green>Killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_42.description: Different opponents give different amounts of experience. Let's kill 1 <color=green>polar bear</color> and see how much experience is credited.\n<color=green>Killed:{current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_43.description:
Level is the main driver of progress in the game. To upgrade your ammunition, you need to reach a high level. Leveling up is done by killing enemy mobs—the more dangerous, the better. Let’s try to destroy <color=green>3 Molochs</color>.
<color=green>Killed molochs: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_44.description:
It’s time to prepare for a journey into the winter biome. First, you need to equip yourself with golden tools and weapons. Create 1 <color=green>golden axe</color>.
<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_45.description: It’s time to prepare for a journey into the winter biome. First, you need to equip yourself with golden tools and weapons. Create 1 <color=green>golden pickaxe</color>.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_46.description: It’s time to prepare for a journey into the winter biome. First, you need to equip yourself with golden tools and weapons. Create 1 <color=green>golden spear</color>. The spear will greatly ease your life in the winter biome.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_47.description: It’s time to prepare for a journey into the winter biome. First, you need to equip yourself with golden tools and weapons. Create 1 <color=green>golden crossbow</color>.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color> It will be very useful in battles against strong opponents.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_48.description: Now, let’s stock up on one of the essential and most in-demand resources – gold. Gather <color=green>500 gold</color>.\n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color> It will be useful for building a cozy shelter.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_49.description: And now let’s get back to leveling up. This time we won’t hold back and will attack dangerous mobs: kill 8 <color=green>skeletons</color>.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>. Each one gives a hefty 350 XP. Just be careful not to run into a skeleton with <color=red>2 skulls</color>, it’s still too early to face such an opponent.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_5.description: Apart from crafting, you can build structures. The most important one is the <color=green>heart stone</color>. If you die and have a <color=green>soul stone</color>, you respawn at its location!\n<color=green>Heart stones created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_50.description: And finally, the most important thing – the conditions for survival in the winter. You need to stock up on dust and wood to light campfires. Additionally, we’ll need a fur hat. Create 1 <color=green>fur hat</color>.\n<color=green>Hats created: {current_count}/{count}</color>. It will significantly increase your chances of survival in the winter.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_51.description: First, you need to build a camp. Find a suitable place for construction and build 1 <color=green>campfire</color>. It will keep you from freezing. You can also place a soul stone next to the campfire.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_52.description: Now you need to outline your shelter. Build 40 <color=green>golden walls</color> around the campfire and soul stone. These are very strong and relatively inexpensive walls.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
