eng.quests.tutorial_1_53.description: You will also need golden doors to ensure that no one can enter the base except YOU or your allies. Build 3 <color=green>golden doors</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_54.description: And now let's take care of the base's defense. Build 4 <color=green>wooden towers</color>. They will help keep your base intact during your absence.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_55.description: Let’s not forget about spikes. Build 20 <color=green>spikes</color>. They will provide additional defense for your base.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_56.description: Now build 2 <color=green>guards</color> next to your soul stone for additional protection.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_57.description: It's time to venture out and explore the new biome. Let's get acquainted with the enemies here, kill 2 <color=green>snowmen</color>. And remember, snowmen with a <color=yellow>skull</color> are much <color=red>stronger</color> than the regular ones, so it's better to avoid them for now.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_58.description: As you've noticed, fighting new enemies is much tougher. Now we need to gather new resources for stronger items. You need to collect 200 <color=green>crystals</color>. Use a <color=yellow>pickaxe</color> to mine crystals. <color=yellow>Tip: Crystals are easier to spot on the map at night, and you can gather more of them than during the day</color>.\n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_59.description: <color=#b70cca>Matter</color> and <color=#e516de>crystals</color> are the most sought-after resources in this world. To craft <color=red>powerful</color> items, you will also need <color=#b70cca>dark matter</color>. To gather it, you must wait for nightfall and destroy shadow creatures. Collect 125 <color=green>dark matter</color>. <color=yellow>Tip: THEY come at night, to the soul stones</color>..\n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_6.description: The second most important building is the <color=green>personal chest</color>. Everything you put in it will stay there, even after you leave the game. Create one and put something useful in it!\n<color=green>Personal chests created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_60.description: Now let's replace the old, outdated golden sword with something better. Create 1 <color=green>dark sword</color>. It has <color=#e06666>decent damage</color>, is very light, and has the ability to <color=yellow>summon the soul</color> of an enemy it kills at night, which will then fight on your side.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_61.description: As you've noticed, <color=black>IT</color> and its minions are quite strong. But everyone has a weakness. THEIR weakness is <color=yellow>light</color>. Let's secure the base quickly – build 4 <color=green>lamps</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_62.description: Now you need to create 1 <color=green>dark shield</color> for better protection against hostile creatures.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_63.description: And now let's go test out your new gear and level up by fighting enemies: kill 5 <color=green>snowmen</color>. But remember, snowmen with a <color=red>skull are still very dangerous</color>!\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_64.description: Now battles with new enemies have become much easier. Next, you need to reach <color=yellow>level 20</color>. Kill 10 <color=green>werewolves</color>.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_65.description: Now you can also craft a <color=#b70cca>dark spear</color>. Try to gather the resources and create 1 <color=green>dark spear</color>.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_66.description: To increase your efficiency in gathering resources, you need to craft <color=yellow>crystal tools</color>. Create 1 <color=green>crystal axe</color>.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_67.description: To increase your efficiency in gathering resources, you need to craft <color=yellow>crystal tools</color>. Create 1 <color=green>crystal pickaxe</color>.\n<color=green>Created: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_68.description: Now let's return to your camp. It's necessary to <color=yellow>fortify it</color>. Build an additional 30 <color=green>golden walls</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_69.description: Now let's strengthen the defense. Build 2 <color=green>fire towers</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_7.description: You need to protect your chest and heart stone. Let's create a small base, for this we will build <color=green>wooden walls around</color>.\n<color=green>Wooden walls built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_70.description: And one more thing: additionally, build 3 <color=green>golden doors</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_71.description: To avoid spending a lot of time walking back home, you need to build a <color=green>return circle</color> and craft a <color=green>return talisman</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_72.description: Let’s test out our upgraded dark spear on wolves! Head to the <color=yellow>Forest Biome</color> and slay <color=green>5 wolves</color>. <color=yellow>You must kill them with the dark spear only!</color> \n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_73.description: Now, let's head to the <color=yellow>Desert</color>. Again. To upgrade our base, we’ll need <color=green>300 cactus</color>. It’s best to harvest cactus with an axe, but remember, cacti are very <color=yellow>spiky</color>, so gathering them might be a bit uncomfortable. \n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_74.description: We'll also need some <color=yellow>fire dust</color>. Sure, you can gather dust in the Forest Biome, but <color=red>red spiders</color> drop much more of it. Collect <color=green>150 dust</color>.\n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_75.description: Let's try to level up a bit more. Accumulate <color=green>5000 points</color>. In the <color=yellow>desert</color>, the best way to gain experience quickly is by killing <color=red>bulls</color> and <color=red>skeletons</color>.\n<color=green>Points accumulated: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_76.description: And finally, let’s head back home! Use the <color=yellow>return circle</color> you built earlier. Now you need to construct <color=green>30 cactus walls</color>. It's best to build these walls around the perimeter of your base, on the outer side, so any attackers will take damage in return. \n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_77.description: Now you need to build <color=green>1 battery</color> to power the heating floor. This will save you from worrying about wood and fires. \n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_78.description: Now, let's build <color=green>5 heating floor units</color>. For the battery to power the floor, it needs to be built <color=yellow>in close proximity</color> or <color=yellow>connected to the heating floor with conductive flooring</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_79.description: <color=yellow>Feathers</color> are needed to craft arrows and some other items. Running around the map searching for birds doesn’t sound great, so let’s build <color=green>1 chicken farm</color>.\n<color=green>Built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_8.description: For convenient entrance and exit from the base, we will build a <color=green>wooden door</color>.\n<color=green>Wooden doors built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_80.description: Now, arm yourself with any crossbow and craft <color=green>500 arrows</color>.\n<color=green>Arrows crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_81.description: It's time for madness! Let’s test our new <color=#d5a0a0>machete</color> on <color=#cfe2f3>snowmen</color>! This weapon can even be used while moving! Try to destroy <color=green>10 snowmen</color> <color=yellow>using the machete</color>!\n<color=green>Snowmen destroyed: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_82.description: Now, test the <color=#d5a0a0>machete</color> on a serious opponent! Try to defeat <color=green>1 polar bear</color> <color=yellow>using the machete</color>! \n<color=green>Polar bears defeated: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_83.description: Leveling up again! Try to accumulate <color=green>6000 points</color> while leveling up. <color=yellow>The next quests will unlock at level 25!</color>\n<color=green>Points earned: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_84.description: Upgrading the base again! <color=#fc11ff>Crystal walls</color> are among the strongest walls in the game. Try building <color=green>30 crystal walls</color>.\n<color=green>Walls built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_85.description: <color=#fc11ff>Crystal doors</color>, like the walls, are highly durable. Plus, they’re automatic! Build <color=green>2 crystal doors</color>.\n<color=green>Doors built: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_86.description: Let's finish building the remaining two <color=#ff4d26>turret cannons</color>. Build <color=green>2 fire towers</color>.\n<color=green>Cannons built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_87.description: Now, to travel comfortably through the <color=#209bed>snowy biome</color>, you need to build <color=green>1 snowmobile</color>.\n<color=green>Snowmobiles built: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_88.description: Now, go explore the <color=#209bed>winter biome</color> to the fullest! Meanwhile, eliminate <color=green>10 polar bears</color>. It’s best to do this with <color=yellow>ranged weapons</color>.\n<color=green>Bears killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_89.description: You need to accumulate <color=green>10000 points</color>.\n<color=green>Points accumulated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_9.description: As you may have noticed, it's very difficult without weapons! They can also be crafted or bought in the store. Try crafting a <color=green>club</color>!\n<color=green>Clubs crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>
eng.quests.tutorial_1_90.description: Now in your hands is a <color=#ff4f4f>very powerful</color> weapon — the <color=#ff8e22>firearm</color>. Shots from this gun can set enemies on fire. Kill <color=green>10 snowmen</color> using only the <color=#ff8e22>firearm</color>.\n<color=green>Snowmen killed with the gun: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_90_1.description: Let's continue! The <color=#ff8e22>firearm</color> is also known for dealing <color=#FF00FF>high damage</color>. Test it out by killing <color=green>4 polar bears</color>.\n<color=green>Polar bears killed with the gun: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_90_2.description: The <color=#ff8e22>firearm</color> also has a high rate of fire. Try to defeat <color=green>20 spiders</color>.\n<color=green>Spiders killed with the gun: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_90_3.description: The test is coming to an end. Now, try sending a couple of players to the menu using a <color=#ff8e22>firearm</color>.\n<color=green>Players killed with a gun: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_91.description: Now, to travel to a new biome, you need to reach <color=yellow>level 30</color>. Accumulate <color=green>10,000 points</color>.\n<color=green>Experience accumulated: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_92.description: Time to get familiar with the local resources. Try harvesting <color=#c27ba0>deadwood</color> using an axe. Chop <color=green>100 dead logs</color>.\n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_93.description: Time to get familiar with the local resources. Try mining some <color=#da6fb1>Timerite</color>—a unique swamp ore—using a pickaxe. Collect <color=green>100 units of Timerite ore</color>.\n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_94.description: Timerite tools are the most efficient and durable. Now that you have the resources, it's time to craft <color=green>1 Timerite pickaxe</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_95.description: Timerite tools are the most efficient and durable. Now that you have the resources, it's time to craft <color=green>1 Timerite axe</color>.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_96.description: Let's get acquainted with the local inhabitants. Try to defeat <color=green>2 swamp monsters</color>. You can recognize these creatures by their large fish tail and a claw on their right hand.\n<color=green>Killed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_97.description: One of the key resources in the swamps is <color=#cd7c5f>chitin</color>. It can be used to craft very powerful and durable items. Try collecting <color=green>20 chitin</color>. Chitin drops from all swamp creatures except slimes, ghosts, and phytosaurs.\n<color=green>Chitin collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_98.description: The swamps are the <color=red>most dangerous</color> place at the moment. To stay safe, it's best to have a powerful weapon. Craft <color=green>1 Timerite sword</color>, which requires the chitin you've already collected.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_1_99.description: <color=#b567ff>Black Fern</color> is the main ingredient for potion brewing and can only be found in the <color=#5c8108>Swamp</color>. Collect <color=green>5 Black Fern</color>.\n<color=green>Collected: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_3_1.description: Now, let’s try to siege the Fort with treasures. We need to prepare. Let’s craft <color=green>1 crystal shield</color>. These shields offer high protection against ranged weapons.\n<color=green>Crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_3_2.description: Great! Now, wait for the treasure fort to appear. It will be marked on the map with a yellow chest icon. Then, head to the fort. You need to destroy <color=green>1 Blue Chest</color>.\n<color=green>Destroyed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_3_3.description: Now let’s try sieging a more serious fort. The Spider Fort is marked with a gray chest on the map. Destroy <color=green>1 Spider Chest</color>.\n<color=green>Destroyed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_3_4.description: It's time to upgrade your siege gear! Craft <color=green>1 Timerite Shield</color>. It offers even better protection against arrows!\n<color=green>Shields crafted: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_3_5.description: Head out in search of the Dark Chest! It's marked on the map as a green chest. It contains even more awesome loot! Destroy <color=green>1 Dark Chest</color>.\n<color=green>Chests destroyed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.quests.tutorial_3_6.description: It’s time to begin the siege of the most powerful fort — the Swamp Fort! Look for the red chest on the map. All the best loot is inside the swamp chest! Destroy <color=green>1 Swamp Chest</color>.\n<color=green>Chests destroyed: {current_count}/{count}</color>.
eng.ragehat.description: It must have once been worn by a great Cernian berserker. The closer death is, the stronger the blows.
eng.rock.description: Stone Age! One of the basic resources. Quite sturdy, but not everlasting.
eng.rockethat.description: Lightens objects and increases running speed.
eng.scorehat.description: Cool hat! Helps you earn points. The best hat for setting records.
eng.shooterhat.description: It may not grant you nobility, but it will definitely boost your ranged weapon damage!
eng.silvercrate.description: This crate can only be opened with a silver key!
eng.silverkey.description: This key can open a silver crate.
eng.sniperhat.description: Allows you to shoot more accurately and at a greater distance.
eng.sonichat.description: The lower the HP, the higher the running speed.
eng.speedhat.description: With this hat, you’ll walk faster. Still not the speed of wind, but hey, it’s better than nothing, right?
eng.spidercore.description: A lump of web and slime. Unpleasant to the touch.
eng.spideregg.description: Just spider eggs. Throw them to summon spiders.
eng.spiderhat.description: Half Spider-Man! Allows you to get more loot from mobs and treasures!
eng.spikeshield.description: Improved wooden shield! Covered in spikes.
eng.staffofplague.description: The hilt bears the mark of the Imperial Alchemy Guild. Why is he here?
eng.staminapotion.description: Allows you not to get tired longer.
eng.stickypotion.description: A potion brewed from the core of a Slime. Terribly sticky!
eng.swamppotion.description: Heals wounds, but very nasty taste.
eng.system.secret_chest: A treasure chest has appeared on the map!
eng.thiefhat.description: Increases the chance to hack. Makes you invisible for a short time.
eng.thunderwand.description: Pushes enemies away with elemental force. Thunderous power in your hands.
eng.timeriteaxe.description: The best of its kind! You can cut down the entire forest!
eng.timeriteblock.description: Timerite refined in a smeltery. Extremely heavy and almost unliftable.
eng.timeriteore.description: An extremely durable material. Difficult to process. Items made from this resource are very sturdy.
eng.timeritepickaxe.description: The best of its kind! All attributes are top-notch.
eng.timeriteshield.description: The best shield for attacking bases!
eng.touristhat.description: With this hat, you can see farther on the map and mini-map!
eng.ui.building.button.lock.auth: You need to log in to build this!
eng.ui.dialogbox.adblock: AdBlocker detected, can't receive Ad reward.
eng.ui.dialogbox.connection.cant_fetch_versi: Failed to check if game is up-to-date.
eng.ui.dialogbox.connection.wrong_version: Version of the client is not up-to-date, you should probably update the game.
eng.ui.dialogbox.placeholder.android_shop: Market is not yet available in Android version.
eng.ui.dialogbox.quick_auth.description: Your character can still be alive on another server. You can forcefully end old session or choose another account.
eng.ui.game.exit: Are you sure that you want to quit?
eng.ui.leaderboard.name: Name
eng.ui.login.help: Log in with social networks to get more features!
eng.ui.mainmenu.banned: It’s currently not possible to connect to this server.\n Try selecting a different one!
eng.ui.mainmenu.lockdown: You have been disconnected from this server because:\n{0}\nDon't worry, just connect to another one!
eng.ui.map.teamnavigation.hint: Click on the map, to create mark for team
eng.ui.menu.exit: Are you sure that you want to exit to main menu?
eng.ui.prestige:
By raising the prestige level, your level will be reset.

In return, you will receive a new badge and a unique skin for one of the items in the game.

Once reset, you will not be able to undo it.
eng.ui.private.adblock: Turn off Adblock to play on this server!
eng.ui.private.need_subscription: Community subscription required to access private servers!
eng.ui.purchase.steamerror: Steam initialization error, make sure your Steam client is running and you are logged in!
eng.ui.quests.authlock: To access the tasks, you need to log in!
eng.ui.shifthintbuilding: To build several objects, hold Shift.
eng.ui.shop.lock: You need to log in to use coins!
eng.ui.sure.exit: Are you sure that you want to close the game window?
eng.ui.teamchat.help: Use /team msg to talk to your teammates or Shift + Enter
eng.ui.tos.short:
Terms Of Service:

You can read the full version of the terms by clicking on the button in this window.

Your account may be permanently blocked without refund for:

- Trading in-game items for real money
- Selling or transferring your account to other players
- Engaging in DDoS attacks, using cheats/hacks/exploits
- Using bots
- Modify game or game code
- Using multiple accounts in the game simultaneously

You can request a refund for a purchase in case of technical malfunction within two weeks.
eng.vampirehat.description: Restores your health when you hit an enemy.
eng.vikingaxe.description: Cuts on both sides! Powerful, but slow.
eng.voidshield.description: Protector of those who never give up.
eng.voidspear.description: THEY explore the world through it.
eng.web.description: Sticky and surprisingly strong! A fairly common resource.
eng.webball.description: Used for shooting with the spider staff. Extra sticky!

fin.acidball.description: Polttavat ammukset happo-keihääseen, aiheuttaen kipua kosketuksessa.
fin.acidwand.description: Ampuu erittäin syövyttävää happoa, heikentäen vihollisia.
fin.bearhat.description: Taitavasti tehty karhun nahasta. Lisää vahinkoa.
fin.bonehat.description: Peitetty kaiverruksilla. Taianomaisesti se imee osan saapuvasta vahingosta.
fin.boostpad.description: Kiihdyttää liikuteltavaa kohdetta. Voidaan käyttää monimutkaisiin liikkeisiin.
fin.building.archer.description: Uskollinen kumppani, ampuu vihollisia. Huolehtii omasta ammusvarastostaan.
fin.building.archertower.description: Potilas ja tarkkaava vartija tarkkailevat sisältä.
fin.building.barrel.description: Erittäin räjähtävää. Varo! Älä tee äkillisiä liikkeitä!
fin.building.battery.description: Henkilökohtainen voimalaitos. Siihen voi liittää sähköisiä rakenteita.
fin.building.bonfire.description: Valmistettu huolella valituista kivistä ja puunrungoista. Lämmittää sinua talvella.
fin.building.chickenfarm.description: Hyvä, kaiken sään kana-koppi. Älä unohda odottaa, kunnes tiput kasvavat!
fin.building.circleofreturn.description: Käytä Paluukivenä kutsuttua esinettä palataksesi takaisin.
fin.building.conductivefloor.description: Hieman nipistää jalkoja, kun seisot sen päällä
fin.building.deaddoorl.description: Tämä ovi ei ole vahvin, mutta ikuinen.
fin.building.deadwalll.description: Kuolleen puun seinillä on erityinen kyky palautua. Ikään kuin ne olisivat elossa. Suojaa ne tulipalolta!
fin.building.decorativefloor1.description: Millainen linnoitus ei ole lattioita?! Käytä erilaisia vaihtoehtoja tehdäksesi siitä kauniimman.
fin.building.diamondwall.description: Kipinöi auringossa. Korjaa itse itsensä automaattisesti. Kestävämpi kuin kulta- tai kiviseinät.
fin.building.electricspikes.description: Se on vaikea nähdä maassa, kun se on pois päältä
fin.building.floor.description: Viholliset eivät voi rakentaa lattiallesi. Se näyttää hyvältä joka tapauksessa.
fin.building.freezer.description: Tee asiat viileämmiksi ympärilläsi! Auttaa viilentymään autiomaassa.
fin.building.goldendoor.description: Keskiaikaisen insinööritaidon ihme: se voi avautua ja sulkeutua. Vahvempi kuin puinen ovi!
fin.building.goldmine.description: Kaivaa hitaasti kultamalmia syvältä maan alta.
fin.building.goldwall.description: Pinta on sileä, joitakin kyhmyjä. Vahvempi kuin puu- tai kiviseinät. Ei syttyvä.
fin.building.guard.description: Liikkuu hitaasti. Katselee ympärilleen kypärän alta. Noudattaa käskyjä.
fin.building.guardarcher.description: Liikkuu hitaasti. Tykkää ampua jousella ja vartioida alueita. Noudattaa käskyjä.
fin.building.lamp.description: Kummallinen, valoa tuottava laite. Suojaa yöllisiltä hirviöiltä.
fin.building.mercenary.description: Seuraa sinua. Yksi kaikkien ja kaikki yhden puolesta!
fin.building.motorcyclewithcarrycot.descript: Sinulle ja ystävällesi! Hidas, mutta siinä on sivuvaunu.
fin.building.platform.description: Seisoessa sen päällä voit ampua yli rakennustesi!
fin.building.rockmine.description: Hitasti nostaa kiviä syvältä maan alta.
fin.building.snowmobile.description: Liikkuu nopeammin lumisilla pinnoilla. Istuimia kahdelle.
fin.building.trap.description: Jousitettu, joka lukitsee uhrin paikoilleen. Viholliset eivät näe sitä.
fin.building.wooddoor.description: Vain sinä ja ystäväsi voitte avata sen - muut eivät pääse sisään.
fin.building.woodenplate.description: Yksinkertainen levy - laudat, naulat ja hiili.
fin.building.woodwall.description: Ei huono puolustus aloitukseksi, mutta palaa hyvin.
fin.chitinbow.description: Tämän jousen nuolet lävistävät puun rungon!
fin.copperthrowingknife.description: Hyödyllinen taloudessa. Voidaan heittää vihollista kohti.
fin.crownhat.description: Sen avulla ase ei enää rikkoudu!
fin.druidhat.description: Metsän henget vaativat uhrauksia. Sudet tulevat vihollistesi sieluja varten.
fin.eaglehat.description: Ketteryys kuin suurella linnulla! Vähentää väsymystä.
fin.extinguisher.description: Siinä on helppokäyttöinen vipu. Sammuttaa tulipaloja.
fin.firepotion.description: Suojaa tulelta ja sytyttää viholliset tuleen.
fin.goldenhammer.description: Paras työkalu tuhoamiseen. Raskaampi pää tarjoaa lisää vahinkoa.
fin.goldenhelmet.description: Estää esineiden menettämisen kuollessa, jos sielukivi on olemassa.
fin.hammer.description: Työkalu rakennusten purkamiseen. Äärimmäisen voimakas, mutta hyvin hidas.
fin.harpoon.description: Kuin tarttumakoukku, mutta parempi. Ase rohkeille meren metsästäjille.
fin.heraldicshield.description: Kilpi näyttää kuuluneen aatelismiehelle Ginesin kreivikunnasta. Hän on todennäköisesti hyvin vanha.
fin.illusionhat.description: Alhaisella HP:lla tekee sinut näkymättömäksi vihollisille.
fin.improvedstickypotion.description: Vangitsee useita vihollisia limansa ansaan. Vaikea pestä pois
fin.inquisitorhat.description: Ensimmäiset, jotka oppivat vastustamaan painajaisia, olivat inkvisitoreita. Tosin Automaattisten Nukkejen ilmestymisen jälkeen he hylättiin.
fin.invisiblepotion.description: Tekee sinusta näkymättömän ja tappaa hitaasti.
fin.ironclub.description: On parempi olla kiistelemättä tämän kanssa!
fin.jasonhat.description: Hieno, vanhanaikainen jääkiekkomaski. Lisää kriittisen vahingon mahdollisuutta.
fin.lasersword.description: Luotu kauan sitten, kaukana kaukana galaksissa...
fin.moneyhat.description: Kolikoiden pudotus kolminkertaistuu. Kanna vaurauden lähde päässäsi.
fin.monsterhunterhat.description: Hirviönmetsästäjän hattu. Vaikuttaa niihin kuin hopeamiekka.
fin.murderer.description: Partaveitsenterävä. Liian painava käytettäväksi yhdellä kädellä. Kuinka monta soturia hän surmasi?
fin.nightmareshield.description: Kilpi huokuu kauheaa ilmapiiriä. Jo sen läheisyys on sietämätöntä.
fin.nightmaresuriken.description: Nämä shiryukenien lentovihellykset muistuttavat jonkun huutoa.
fin.notify.coins.lock: Sinun täytyy kirjautua sisään käyttääksesi kolikoita!
fin.polarbowrecipe.description: Jos luet tämän reseptin, uuden esineen valmistus avautuu.
fin.polarcoin.description: Sisältää talven voiman, voidaan vaihtaa resepteihin. Putoaa valkoisista karhuista. Lisääntynyt pudotus Polar Skinillä!
fin.polarhat.description: Talvinen mukavuus lumimyrskyjen keskellä. Yhdistettynä polaarimiekkaan tai ristipyssyyn - lisää vahinkoa!
fin.polarhatrecipe.description: Jos luet tämän reseptin, uuden esineen valmistus avautuu.
fin.polarpotionrecipe.description: Jos luet tämän reseptin, uuden esineen valmistus avautuu.
fin.polarshieldrecipe.description: Jos luet tämän reseptin, uuden esineen valmistus avautuu.
fin.polarsword.description: Miekan terä, joka on peitetty huurteella, on järkähtämätön vihollisia vastaan.
fin.polarswordrecipe.description: Jos luet tämän reseptin, uuden esineen valmistus avautuu.
fin.pumpkinhat.description: Mahtava juhlava asu! Voi antaa karkkia!
fin.ragehat.description: Se on varmasti ollut kerran suuren Cernian berserkerin käytössä. Mitä lähempänä kuolema on, sitä voimakkaammat iskut.
fin.sonichat.description: Mitä alempi HP, sitä korkeampi juoksunopeus.
fin.spideregg.description: Pelkkiä hämähäkinmunia. Heitä ne kutsuaksesi hämähäkkejä.
fin.staffofplague.description: Kädensijaan on merkitty Keisarillisen Alkemiakillan tunnus. Miksi se on täällä?
fin.stickypotion.description: Juoma, joka on keitetty liman ytimistä. Kamalan tahmea!
fin.swamppotion.description: Parantaa haavat, mutta erittäin epämiellyttävä maku.
fin.thiefhat.description: Lisää hakkeroinnin mahdollisuutta. Tekee sinut näkymättömäksi hetkeksi.
fin.thunderwand.description: Työntää viholliset pois elementaalisella voimalla. Jylinävoima käsissäsi.
fin.timeritesword.description: Mitä tahansa tätä terää koskettaa, kuolee.
fin.ui.building.button.lock.auth: Sinun täytyy kirjautua sisään rakentaaksesi tämän!
fin.ui.dialogbox.adblock: AdBlocker havaittu, mainospalkintoa ei voi vastaanottaa.
fin.ui.dialogbox.connection.wrong_version: Asiakasversio ei ole ajan tasalla, sinun pitäisi päivittää peli.
fin.ui.dialogbox.placeholder.android_shop: Markkina ei ole vielä saatavilla Android-versiossa.
fin.ui.dialogbox.quick_auth.description: Hahmosi voi olla edelleen elossa toisella palvelimella. Voit päättää vanhan istunnon väkisin tai valita toisen tilin.
fin.ui.leaderboard.name: Nimi
fin.ui.login.help: Kirjaudu sisään sosiaalisen median avulla saadaksesi lisää ominaisuuksia!
fin.ui.mainmenu.banned: Olet katkaissut yhteyden tähän palvelimeen :(\nÄlä huoli, yhdistä vain toiseen!
fin.ui.mainmenu.lockdown: Olet katkaissut yhteyden tähän palvelimeen syystä:{0}\nÄlä huoli, voit yhdistää toiseen palvelimeen!
fin.ui.menu.exit: Oletko varma, että haluat palata päävalikkoon?
fin.ui.shifthintbuilding: Useiden objektien rakentamiseksi pidä Shiftiä alhaalla.
fin.ui.shop.lock: Sinun täytyy kirjautua sisään käyttääksesi kolikoita!
fin.ui.sure.exit: Oletko varma, että haluat sulkea peli-ikkunan?
fin.ui.teamchat.help: Käytä /team msg puhuaksesi joukkuetovereidesi kanssa tai Shift + Enter
fin.vikingaxe.description: Leikkaa molemmilta puolilta! Voimakas, mutta hidas.

fra.acidball.description: Projectiles enflammés pour la baguette acide, causant de la douleur au contact.
fra.acidwand.description: Tire de l'acide hautement corrosif, affaiblissant les ennemis.
fra.arrow.description: En bois, avec une pointe acérée.
fra.batwithnails.description: Inscrit sur le manche est le nom "Lucille".
fra.bearhat.description: Fabriqué avec habileté à partir d'une peau d'ours. Augmente les dégâts.
fra.bonehat.description: Recouverte de sculptures. Magiquement, elle absorbe une partie des dégâts entrants.
fra.boomerang.description: Ressemble à une banane. Pas très intimidant...
fra.boostpad.description: Accélère tout objet mobile. Peut être utilisé pour des mouvements complexes.
fra.boxinggloves.description: La première règle du club de combat...
fra.building.archer.description: Un compagnon fidèle, tire sur les ennemis. Fournit des munitions pour lui-même.
fra.building.archertower.description: Un garde patient et attentif surveille de l'intérieur.
fra.building.barrel.description: Hautement explosif. Faites attention ! Ne faites aucun mouvement brusque !
fra.building.battery.description: Centrale électrique personnelle. Les structures électriques peuvent y être connectées.
fra.building.bonfire.description: Fabriqué à partir de roches et de bûches soigneusement sélectionnées. Vous réchauffe en hiver.
fra.building.cactuswall.description: Dangereux comme un cactus ! Susceptible de combustion.
fra.building.chickenfarm.description: Bonne poulailler tout temps. N'oubliez pas d'attendre que les poussins grandissent!
fra.building.circleofreturn.description: Utilisez la Pierre de Retour pour y retourner par téléportation.
fra.building.conductivefloor.description: Pince légèrement vos pieds lorsque vous êtes debout dessus
fra.building.coppermine.description: Exploite le cuivre des entrailles de la terre.
fra.building.deaddoorl.description: Cette porte n'est pas la plus forte, mais éternelle.
fra.building.deadwalll.description: Les murs en bois mort ont une capacité spéciale à être restaurés. Comme s'ils étaient vivants. Protégez-les du feu !
fra.building.decorativefloor1.description: Quel genre de base n'a pas de planchers ?! Utilisez différentes variantes pour le rendre joli.
fra.building.diamonddoor.description: Très beau. Automatique, comme dans un supermarché!
fra.building.diamondwall.description: Scintille au soleil. Se répare automatiquement. Plus durable que les murs en or ou en pierre.
fra.building.electricspikes.description: Il est difficile de la voir au sol lorsqu'elle est éteinte
fra.building.electricwall.description: Envie de recevoir une décharge électrique ?
fra.building.farm.description: N'oubliez pas d'attendre que les porcelets grandissent !
fra.building.fireballtower.description: Mystérieuse et magique. Tire des boules de feu.
fra.building.floor.description: Les ennemis ne peuvent pas construire sur vos sols. Ça a l'air bien, de toute façon.
fra.building.freezer.description: Rend les choses plus fraîches autour de vous ! Aide à se rafraîchir dans le désert.
fra.building.goldendoor.description: Une merveille de l'ingénierie médiévale : il peut s'ouvrir et se fermer. Plus solide qu'une porte en bois !
fra.building.goldmine.description: Extrait lentement du minerai d'or des profondeurs souterraines.
fra.building.goldwall.description: La surface est lisse, avec quelques bosses. Plus solide que les murs en bois ou en pierre. Non inflammable.
fra.building.guard.description: Se déplace lentement. Regarde autour de lui depuis sous son casque. Suit les ordres.
fra.building.guardarcher.description: Se déplace lentement. Aime tirer à l'arc et protéger les zones. Suit les ordres.
fra.building.knightmannequin.description: Structure spéciale pour entraîner des mercenaires.
fra.building.lamp.description: Un étrange dispositif produisant de la lumière. Protège des monstres nocturnes.
fra.building.mercenary.description: Vous suit partout. Un pour tous et tous pour un !
fra.building.motorcyclewithcarrycot.descript: Pour vous et un ami ! Lent, mais a une side-car.
fra.building.phantomtower.description: Confiez votre sécurité aux esprits maléfiques.
fra.building.platform.description: En étant dessus, vous pouvez tirer par-dessus vos bâtiments !
fra.building.policecar.description: Propriété du district du comté. Pour maintenir l'ordre !
fra.building.portal.description: Fissure dans la matière créée artificiellement !
fra.building.privatechest.description: Conservera ce que vous y mettez, même si vous quittez le jeu.
fra.building.repairbox.description: Répare les objets qui y sont placés, d'une manière ou d'une autre.
fra.building.rockmine.description: Extrait lentement la pierre des profondeurs de la terre.
fra.building.rockwall.description: Plus durable que les murs en bois. Ne brûle pas.
fra.building.scooter.description: Lent, mais plus rapide que la marche !
fra.building.sleigh.description: Il est temps de glisser sur la colline !
fra.building.snowmobile.description: Se déplace plus rapidement sur les surfaces enneigées. Sièges deux.
fra.building.trap.description: S'enclenche lorsqu'on marche dessus, il immobilise la victime. Les ennemis ne peuvent pas le voir.
fra.building.wallbreaker.description: Ressemble à une machine de démolition. C'en est une.
fra.building.wooddoor.description: Seuls vous et vos amis pouvez l'ouvrir - les autres ne peuvent pas entrer.
fra.building.woodenplate.description: Une simple plaque - des planches, des clous et du charbon de bois.
fra.building.woodwall.description: Pas une mauvaise défense pour commencer, mais ça brûle bien.
fra.cactushat.description: Reflète une petite quantité de dégâts.
fra.chitinbow.description: Les flèches de cette arbalète percent un tronc d'arbre !
fra.claws.description: Trois, quatre, mieux vaut verrouiller votre porte.
fra.club.description: Sur la poignée se trouvent des marques grossières.
fra.coppershield.description: Un bouclier avec mille ans d'histoire.
fra.copperspear.description: L'humanité a commencé avec des copies !
fra.copperthrowingknife.description: Utile dans l'économie. Peut être lancé sur un ennemi.
fra.cowhat.description: Qui dit "Mooooooo"? Un loup déguisé en mouton.
fra.crowbar.description: Peut être utilisé pour forcer des portes !
fra.crownhat.description: Avec cela, l'arme ne se casse plus !
fra.darkboomerang.description: Une version améliorée du boomerang normal.
fra.darkspear.description: Transforme le bouclier ennemi en passoire.
fra.darkthrowingknife.description: Vole avec la puissance de la nuit !
fra.diamondshield.description: Bon pour les sièges de base.
fra.druidhat.description: Les esprits de la forêt exigent un sacrifice. Les loups viendront pour les âmes de vos ennemis.
fra.eaglehat.description: Agilité comme un grand oiseau ! Réduit la fatigue.
fra.extinguisher.description: Possède un levier facile à utiliser. Éteint les feux.
fra.firepotion.description: Protège du feu et met les ennemis en feu.
fra.furhat.description: Garde la chaleur plus longtemps dans le biome hivernal.
fra.gatherpotion.description: Vous permet de collecter plus de ressources !
fra.goldenbow.description: Manche durable, avec une corde solide.
fra.goldenhammer.description: Meilleur outil pour la destruction. Une tête plus lourde fournit des dégâts accrus.
fra.goldenhelmet.description: Vous permet de ne pas perdre d'objets à la mort, s'il y a une pierre d'âme.
fra.goldenshield.description: Peut aider à survivre dans ce monde.
fra.hammer.description: Outil pour démanteler les bâtiments. Extrêmement puissant, mais très lent.
fra.happyclub.description: Une fois par an et le bâton tire.
fra.harlequinhat.description: Évitez les balles, dansez comme un arlequin !
fra.harpoon.description: Comme un grappin, mais mieux. Une arme pour les courageux chasseurs de la mer.
fra.heraldicshield.description: Le bouclier semble avoir appartenu à un noble du comté de Ginesi. Il est probablement très ancien.
fra.illusionhat.description: À faible HP, cela vous rend invisible aux ennemis.
fra.improvedstickypotion.description: Capture plusieurs ennemis dans un piège à slime. Difficile à laver
fra.inquisitorhat.description: Les premiers à apprendre à résister aux cauchemars étaient les Inquisiteurs. Cependant, après l'apparition des Poupées Automatiques, ils ont été abandonnés.
fra.invisiblepotion.description: Vous rend invisible et vous tue lentement.
fra.iodinepotion.description: Protège contre l'empoisonnement dans le marais.
fra.ironclub.description: Il vaut mieux ne pas discuter avec ça !
fra.item_description.custom_effect_type.hard: <color=#FF00FF>Moindre chance de toucher à travers le bouclier.</color>
fra.item_description.custom_effect_type.refl: <color=#FF00FF>Renvoie une partie des dégâts à l'ennemi.</color>
fra.item_description.prey.type.2: <color=#FF00FF>Bon pour rassembler des bûches et des minerais.</color>
fra.jasonhat.description: Superbe masque de hockey vintage. Augmente les chances de dégâts critiques.
fra.katana.description: Une lame légère et marquée par les batailles.
fra.kunai.description: Permet de causer des dégâts à travers les ennemis.
fra.lamphat.description: Vous aide à voir la nuit.
fra.lasersword.description: Créé il y a longtemps, dans une galaxie lointaine, très lointaine...
fra.lollipop.description: Ressemble à une chose de fête !
fra.mace.description: Elle vous met juste à terre !
fra.machete.description: Vous avez l'air fou en le tenant !
fra.magichat.description: Les pièges à l'intérieur ne sont pas terribles !
fra.moneyhat.description: Triple la chute de pièces. Portez une source de richesse sur votre tête.
fra.monsterhunterhat.description: Chapeau de chasseur de monstres. Fonctionne sur eux comme une épée en argent.
fra.murderer.description: Tranchant comme un rasoir. Trop lourd pour être utilisé d'une seule main. Combien de guerriers a-t-il tué ?
fra.nightmarescythe.description: Des âmes agitées sont emprisonnées dans la lame.
fra.nightmareshield.description: Le bouclier dégage une aura terrible. Même être à proximité est insupportable.
fra.nightmaresuriken.description: Le sifflement du vol de ces shiryukens ressemble à un cri.
fra.notify.became_leader: Vous êtes maintenant le chef d'équipe !
fra.notify.coins.lock: Vous devez vous connecter pour utiliser des pièces !
fra.notify.heartstone_destroyed: Votre pierre de cœur a été détruite !
fra.pinkshooterhat.description: Augmente considérablement les dégâts des armes à distance.
fra.polarbowrecipe.description: Si vous lisez cette recette, l'artisanat d'un nouvel objet sera ouvert.
fra.polarcoin.description: Contient la force de l'hiver, peut être échangé contre des recettes. Il tombe des ours blancs. Une augmentation de la chute avec une peau polaire !
fra.polarhat.description: Confort hivernal au cœur des tempêtes de neige. En combinaison avec une épée polaire ou une arbalète - augmente les dégâts !
fra.polarhatrecipe.description: Si vous lisez cette recette, l'artisanat d'un nouvel objet sera ouvert.
fra.polarpotion.description: Augmente les dégâts des armes à longue portée !
fra.polarpotionrecipe.description: Si vous lisez cette recette, l'artisanat d'un nouvel objet sera ouvert.
fra.polarshieldrecipe.description: Si vous lisez cette recette, l'artisanat d'un nouvel objet sera ouvert.
fra.polarsword.description: Le tranchant de l'épée couvert de givre est inflexible devant les ennemis.
fra.polarswordrecipe.description: Si vous lisez cette recette, l'artisanat d'un nouvel objet sera ouvert.
fra.propellerhat.description: La flèche pointe vers des objets circulaires en forme de piège.
fra.pumpkinhat.description: Tenue de vacances géniale ! Peut donner des bonbons !
fra.ragehat.description: Il a dû être porté autrefois par un grand berserker cernien. Plus la mort est proche, plus les coups sont forts.
fra.rockethat.description: Allège les objets et augmente la vitesse de course.
fra.rubysword.description: Lame cérémonielle des officiers de Tanai.
fra.shooterhat.description: Augmente les dégâts des armes à distance.
fra.snowball.description: Munitions pour la tour de neige
fra.sonichat.description: Plus les HP sont bas, plus la vitesse de course est élevée.
fra.spear.description: Bon pour la chasse. Ignore les boucliers.
fra.spideregg.description: Juste des œufs d'araignée. Lancez-les pour invoquer des araignées.
fra.spiderhat.description: La moitié de l'homme-araignée ! Tire plus de choses !
fra.spikeshield.description: Bouclier en bois amélioré ! Couvert de pointes.
fra.staffofplague.description: La poignée porte la marque de la Guilde Impériale d'Alchimie. Pourquoi est-il ici?
fra.staminapotion.description: Permet de ne pas se fatiguer plus longtemps.
fra.stickypotion.description: Une potion brassée à partir du noyau d'un Slime. Terriblement collante !
fra.swamppotion.description: Guérit les blessures, mais a un goût très désagréable.
fra.system.secret_chest: Un coffre au trésor est apparu sur la carte !
fra.techhat.description: Les véhicules subissent moins de dégâts
fra.thiefhat.description: Augmente les chances de piratage. Vous rend invisible pendant une courte période.
fra.throwingknife.description: Très bon - si vous êtes précis !
fra.thunderwand.description: Repousse les ennemis avec une force élémentaire. Une puissance tonitruante dans vos mains.
fra.timeriteshield.description: Le meilleur bouclier pour attaquer les bases !
fra.timeritesword.description: Tout ce que cette lame touche, meurt.
fra.touristhat.description: Vous voyez loin en portant cela !
fra.ui.build.require_zone.canbuildunitsaroun: Nécessite un cœur de pierre à proximité
fra.ui.building.button.lock.auth: Vous devez vous connecter pour construire ceci !
fra.ui.connecting.status.check_version: Vérification de la version du client...
fra.ui.dialogbox.adblock: Bloqueur de publicités détecté, impossible de recevoir la récompense publicitaire.
fra.ui.dialogbox.connection.cant_fetch_versi: Échec de la vérification de la mise à jour du jeu.
fra.ui.dialogbox.connection.wrong_version: La version du client n'est pas à jour, vous devriez probablement mettre à jour le jeu.
fra.ui.dialogbox.placeholder.android_shop: Le marché n'est pas encore disponible dans la version Android.
fra.ui.dialogbox.quick_auth.description: Votre personnage peut encore être en vie sur un autre serveur. Vous pouvez mettre fin de force à l'ancienne session ou choisir un autre compte.
fra.ui.leaderboard.name: Nom
fra.ui.login.help: Connectez-vous avec les réseaux sociaux pour obtenir plus de fonctionnalités!
fra.ui.mainmenu.banned: Vous avez été déconnecté de ce serveur :(\nNe vous inquiétez pas, connectez-vous simplement à un autre!
fra.ui.mainmenu.lockdown: Vous avez été déconnecté de ce serveur car : \n{0}\nNe vous inquiétez pas, connectez-vous simplement à un autre !
fra.ui.map.teamnavigation.hint: Cliquez sur la carte pour créer une marque pour l'équipe
fra.ui.menu.exit: Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir retourner au menu principal ?
fra.ui.shifthintbuilding: Pour construire plusieurs objets, maintenez la touche Shift enfoncée.
fra.ui.shop.lock: Vous devez vous connecter pour utiliser des pièces !
fra.ui.sure.exit: Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir fermer la fenêtre du jeu ?
fra.ui.teamchat.help: Utilisez /team msg pour parler à vos coéquipiers ou Shift + Entrée
fra.vampirehat.description: Restaure votre santé lorsque vous frappez un ennemi.
fra.vikingaxe.description: Coupes des deux côtés ! Puissant, mais lent.
fra.voidspear.description: ILS explorent le monde à travers cela.
fra.warning.return_to_world: Retournez sur le champ de bataille !
fra.webball.description: Très collant ! Contient de la salive !
fra.woodenhammer.description: Outil de base pour démonter les bâtiments.

ind.acidball.description: Proyektil yang terbakar untuk tongkat asam, menyebabkan rasa sakit saat kontak.
ind.acidwand.description: Menembakkan asam yang sangat korosif, melemahkan musuh.
ind.bearhat.description: Terampil dibuat dari kulit beruang. Meningkatkan kerusakan.
ind.bonehat.description: Ditutupi dengan ukiran. Secara magis, ia menyerap sebagian dari kerusakan yang masuk.
ind.boomerang.description: Terlihat seperti pisang. Tidak terlalu menakutkan...
ind.boostpad.description: Mempercepat objek yang dapat bergerak. Dapat digunakan untuk gerakan kompleks.
ind.building.archer.description: Teman setia, menembak musuh. Menyediakan amunisi untuk dirinya sendiri.
ind.building.archertower.description: Penjaga yang sabar dan teliti mengawasi dari dalam.
ind.building.barrel.description: Sangat mudah meledak. Hati-hati! Jangan membuat gerakan tiba-tiba!
ind.building.battery.description: Pembangkit listrik pribadi. Struktur listrik dapat terhubung ke sana.
ind.building.bonfire.description: Terbuat dari batu dan kayu yang dipilih dengan hati-hati. Menghangatkan Anda di musim dingin.
ind.building.chickenfarm.description: Kandang ayam yang bagus untuk segala cuaca. Jangan lupa menunggu ayam-anak tumbuh besar!
ind.building.circleofreturn.description: Gunakan Batu Kembali untuk teleportasi kembali ke sana.
ind.building.conductivefloor.description: Sedikit mencubit kaki Anda saat berdiri di atasnya
ind.building.deaddoorl.description: Pintu ini tidak terkuat, tetapi abadi.
ind.building.deadwalll.description: Dinding kayu mati memiliki kemampuan khusus untuk dipulihkan. Seolah-olah mereka hidup. Lindungi mereka dari api!
ind.building.decorativefloor1.description: Jenis dasar apa yang tidak memiliki lantai?! Gunakan variasi yang berbeda untuk membuatnya lebih cantik.
ind.building.diamonddoor.description: Sangat indah. Otomatis, seperti di supermarket!
ind.building.diamondwall.description: Berkilauan di bawah sinar matahari. Dapat memperbaiki dirinya sendiri secara otomatis. Lebih tahan lama daripada dinding emas atau batu.
ind.building.electricspikes.description: Sulit untuk melihatnya di tanah saat mati
ind.building.farm.description: Jangan lupa menunggu anak babi tumbuh besar!
ind.building.fireballtower.description: Misterius dan ajaib. Menembakkan bola api.
ind.building.floor.description: Musuh tidak dapat membangun di lantai Anda. Terlihat bagus, bagaimanapun juga.
ind.building.freezer.description: Membuat segalanya lebih keren! Membantu untuk mendinginkan diri di padang pasir.
ind.building.goldendoor.description: Keajaiban teknik abad pertengahan: dapat dibuka dan ditutup. Lebih kuat dari pintu kayu!
ind.building.goldmine.description: Lambat-lambat menambang bijih emas dari dalam tanah.
ind.building.goldwall.description: Permukaannya halus, dengan beberapa tonjolan. Lebih kuat dari dinding kayu atau batu. Tidak mudah terbakar.
ind.building.guard.description: Bergerak lambat. Melihat sekeliling dari bawah helmnya. Mengikuti perintah.
ind.building.guardarcher.description: Bergerak lambat. Suka menembakkan panah dan menjaga area. Mengikuti perintah.
ind.building.knightmannequin.description: Struktur khusus untuk melatih tentara bayaran.
ind.building.lamp.description: Alat yang aneh dan menghasilkan cahaya. Melindungi dari monster malam.
ind.building.mercenary.description: Mengikuti kamu. Satu untuk semua dan semua untuk satu!
ind.building.motorcyclewithcarrycot.descript: Untukmu dan temanmu! Lambat, tapi memiliki sidecar.
ind.building.phantomtower.description: Percayakan keselamatan Anda pada roh jahat.
ind.building.platform.description: Berdiri di atasnya, kamu bisa menembak melalui bangunanmu!
ind.building.policecar.description: Milik distrik kabupaten. Untuk menjaga ketertiban!
ind.building.portal.description: Retakan dalam materi yang dibuat secara artifisial!
ind.building.privatechest.description: Akan menyimpan apa yang Anda masukkan ke dalamnya, bahkan jika Anda meninggalkan permainan.
ind.building.repairbox.description: Memperbaiki barang yang dimasukkan ke dalamnya, entah bagaimana.
ind.building.rockmine.description: Perlahan-lahan mengekstraksi batu dari dalam tanah.
ind.building.rockwall.description: Lebih tahan lama daripada dinding kayu. Tidak terbakar.
ind.building.scooter.description: Lambat, tapi lebih cepat daripada berjalan kaki!
ind.building.snowmobile.description: Bergerak lebih cepat di permukaan bersalju. Tempat duduk untuk dua orang.
ind.building.trap.description: Terpicu saat diinjak, ia menahan korban di tempat. Musuh tidak bisa melihatnya.
ind.building.wallbreaker.description: Terlihat seperti mesin penghancur. Itu benar.
ind.building.warmfloor.description: Kenyamanan yang lebih tinggi di rumah Anda!
ind.building.wooddoor.description: Hanya kamu dan teman-temanmu yang bisa membukanya - orang lain tidak bisa masuk.
ind.building.woodenplate.description: Sebuah papan sederhana - papan, paku, dan arang.
ind.building.woodwall.description: Tidak buruk untuk pertahanan awal, tetapi mudah terbakar.
ind.chitinbow.description: Panah dari busur ini menembus batang pohon!
ind.chitinshield.description: Ringan dan memberikan perlindungan yang sangat baik.
ind.claws.description: Tiga, empat, lebih baik kunci pintu Anda.
ind.copperthrowingknife.description: Berguna dalam ekonomi. Dapat dilemparkan ke musuh.
ind.cowhat.description: Siapa yang mengatakan "Mooooooo"? Sebuah serigala berbalut domba.
ind.crownhat.description: Dengan ini, senjata tidak akan rusak lebih lama!
ind.darkboomerang.description: Versi yang ditingkatkan dari boomerang biasa.
ind.droppotion.description: Lebih banyak item jatuh dari mana saja!
ind.druidhat.description: Roh hutan membutuhkan pengorbanan. Serigala akan datang untuk jiwa musuh-musuhmu.
ind.eaglehat.description: Kelincahan seperti burung besar! Mengurangi kelelahan.
ind.experiencepotion.description: Memungkinkan kamu mendapatkan lebih banyak pengalaman!
ind.extinguisher.description: Memiliki tuas yang mudah digunakan. Memadamkan api.
ind.firepotion.description: Melindungi dari api dan membuat musuh terbakar.
ind.furhat.description: Menjaga panas lebih lama di wilayah musim dingin.
ind.gatherpotion.description: Memungkinkan kamu mengumpulkan lebih banyak sumber daya!
ind.goldenbow.description: Stok yang tahan lama, dengan tali yang kuat.
ind.goldenhammer.description: Alat terbaik untuk penghancuran. Kepala yang lebih berat memberikan kerusakan yang lebih besar.
ind.goldenhelmet.description: Memungkinkan Anda untuk tidak kehilangan objek saat mati, jika ada batu jiwa.
ind.goldenshield.description: Dapat membantu bertahan hidup di dunia ini.
ind.goldenspear.description: Senjata pilihan dari tentara bayaran Mussuri.
ind.goldensword.description: Bersinar indah di bawah sinar matahari.
ind.hammer.description: Alat untuk membongkar bangunan. Sangat kuat, tetapi sangat lambat.
ind.harpoon.description: Seperti kait, tapi lebih baik. Senjata untuk pemburu laut yang berani.
ind.heraldicshield.description: Nampaknya perisai ini milik seorang bangsawan dari Kabupaten Ginesi. Dia mungkin sangat tua.
ind.illusionhat.description: Pada HP rendah, membuatmu tidak terlihat oleh musuh.
ind.improvedstickypotion.description: Menangkap beberapa musuh dalam perangkap lendir. Sulit untuk dibersihkan
ind.inquisitorhat.description: Orang pertama yang belajar untuk melawan mimpi buruk adalah Inkuisitor. Memang, setelah munculnya Boneka Otomatis, mereka ditinggalkan.
ind.invisiblepotion.description: Membuatmu tak terlihat dan perlahan membunuhmu.
ind.ironclub.description: Lebih baik tidak bertengkar dengan ini!
ind.item_description.custom_effect_type.hard: <color=#FF00FF>Peluang lebih rendah untuk mengenai melalui perisai.</color>
ind.item_description.custom_effect_type.refl: <color=#FF00FF>Merefleksikan sebagian dari kerusakan kembali ke musuh.</color>
ind.jasonhat.description: Masker hoki vintage yang bagus. Meningkatkan peluang kerusakan kritis.
ind.kunai.description: Memungkinkan untuk memberikan kerusakan melalui musuh.
ind.lamphat.description: Membantu Anda melihat di malam hari.
ind.lasersword.description: Dibuat sudah lama, di galaksi yang jauh jauh...
ind.moneyhat.description: Meningkatkan jumlah koin yang jatuh tiga kali lipat. Kenakan sumber kekayaan di kepala Anda.
ind.monsterhunterhat.description: Topi Pemburu Monster. Bekerja pada mereka seperti pedang perak.
ind.murderer.description: Sangat tajam. Terlalu berat untuk digunakan dengan satu tangan. Berapa banyak prajurit yang berhasil ia kalahkan?
ind.nightmarescythe.description: Jiwa-jiwa gelisah terperangkap di dalam pedang.
ind.nightmareshield.description: Perisai ini memancarkan aura yang mengerikan. Bahkan berada di dekatnya sangat tidak tahan.
ind.nightmaresuriken.description: Siulan dari terbangnya shiryuken ini mirip dengan teriakan seseorang.
ind.notify.coins.lock: Anda perlu masuk untuk menggunakan koin!
ind.pinkshooterhat.description: Sangat meningkatkan kerusakan senjata jarak jauh.
ind.polarbowrecipe.description: Jika Anda membaca resep ini, kemampuan membuat item baru akan terbuka.
ind.polarcoin.description: Mengandung kekuatan musim dingin, dapat ditukar dengan resep. Jatuh dari beruang putih. Drop yang meningkat dengan Polar Skin!
ind.polarhat.description: Kenyamanan musim dingin di tengah badai salju. Dalam kombinasi dengan pedang atau ketapel kutub - meningkatkan kerusakan!
ind.polarhatrecipe.description: Jika Anda membaca resep ini, maka akan membuka kerajinan item baru.
ind.polarpotionrecipe.description: Jika Anda membaca resep ini, kemampuan membuat item baru akan terbuka.
ind.polarshieldrecipe.description: Jika Anda membaca resep ini, maka akan membuka kerajinan item baru.
ind.polarsword.description: Ujung pedang yang tertutup embun beku sangat kuat di depan musuh
ind.polarswordrecipe.description: Jika Anda membaca resep ini, kemampuan membuat item baru akan terbuka.
ind.propellerhat.description: Panah menunjuk ke objek berbentuk lingkaran seperti perangkap.
ind.pumpkinhat.description: Pakaian liburan yang bagus! Bisa memberikan permen!
ind.ragehat.description: Pasti pernah dipakai oleh seorang prajurit Cernian berserker yang hebat. Semakin dekat kematian, semakin kuat pukulannya.
ind.rockethat.description: Meringankan benda dan meningkatkan kecepatan berlari.
ind.sonichat.description: Semakin rendah HP, semakin tinggi kecepatan berlari.
ind.spideregg.description: Hanya telur laba-laba. Lempar untuk memanggil laba-laba.
ind.spiderhat.description: Separuh dari manusia laba-laba! Menarik keluar lebih banyak barang!
ind.spikeshield.description: Perisai kayu yang ditingkatkan! Dilapisi dengan duri.
ind.staffofplague.description: Pegangan perisai menunjukkan tanda dari Guild Alkimia Kekaisaran. Mengapa dia di sini?
ind.stickypotion.description: Ramuan yang disuling dari inti Slime. Sangat lengket!
ind.swamppotion.description: Menyembuhkan luka, tapi rasanya sangat tidak enak.
ind.system.secret_chest: Peti harta karun muncul di peta!
ind.thiefhat.description: Meningkatkan peluang untuk diretas. Membuat Anda tidak terlihat untuk sementara waktu.
ind.thunderwand.description: Mendorong musuh dengan kekuatan elemen. Kekuatan petir di tanganmu.
ind.timeritesword.description: Apapun yang disentuh oleh pedang ini, akan mati.
ind.touristhat.description: Anda dapat melihat jauh ketika memakainya!
ind.ui.building.button.lock.auth: Anda perlu masuk untuk membangun ini!
ind.ui.dialogbox.adblock: AdBlocker terdeteksi, tidak dapat menerima hadiah iklan.
ind.ui.dialogbox.connection.wrong_version: Versi klien tidak terbaru, Anda mungkin perlu memperbarui game.
ind.ui.dialogbox.placeholder.android_shop: Pasar belum tersedia dalam versi Android.
ind.ui.dialogbox.quick_auth.description: Karakter Anda masih bisa hidup di server lain. Anda dapat memaksa mengakhiri sesi lama atau memilih akun lain.
ind.ui.leaderboard.name: Nama
ind.ui.login.help: Masuk dengan jaringan sosial untuk mendapatkan fitur lebih banyak!
ind.ui.mainmenu.banned: Anda telah terputus dari server ini :(\nJangan khawatir, cukup hubungkan ke server lain!
ind.ui.mainmenu.lockdown: Anda telah terputus dari server ini karena:\n{0}\nJangan khawatir, cukup sambungkan ke server lain!
ind.ui.map.teamnavigation.hint: Klik pada peta, untuk membuat tanda untuk tim
ind.ui.menu.exit: Apakah Anda yakin ingin keluar ke menu utama?
ind.ui.shifthintbuilding: Untuk membangun beberapa objek, tahan tombol Shift.
ind.ui.shop.lock: Anda perlu masuk untuk menggunakan koin!
ind.ui.sure.exit: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menutup jendela game?
ind.ui.teamchat.help: Gunakan /team msg untuk berbicara dengan rekan tim Anda atau Shift + Enter
ind.vampirehat.description: Memulihkan kesehatan Anda ketika Anda mengenai musuh.
ind.vikingaxe.description: Memotong di kedua sisi! Kuat, tapi lambat.

ita.acidball.description: Proiettili infuocati per la bacchetta acida, causano dolore al contatto.
ita.acidwand.description: Spara acido altamente corrosivo, indebolendo i nemici.
ita.arrow.description: Di legno, con una punta affilata.
ita.bearhat.description: Abilmente realizzato con pelle d'orso. Aumenta il danno.
ita.bonehat.description: Ricoperto di intagli. Magicamente, assorbe parte del danno in arrivo.
ita.boomerang.description: Sembra una banana. Non molto intimidatorio...
ita.boostpad.description: Accelera qualsiasi oggetto mobile. Può essere usato per movimenti complessi.
ita.boxinggloves.description: Il primo regola del club della lotta...
ita.building.archer.description: Un compagno leale, spara ai nemici. Fornisce munizioni per sé stesso.
ita.building.archertower.description: Una guardia paziente e attenta osserva dall'interno.
ita.building.barrel.description: Altamente esplosivo. Attenzione! Non fare movimenti improvvisi!
ita.building.battery.description: Centrale elettrica personale. Le strutture elettriche possono essere collegate ad essa.
ita.building.bonfire.description: Fatto di rocce e tronchi accuratamente selezionati. Ti riscalda durante l'inverno.
ita.building.cactuswall.description: Pericoloso come un cactus! Soggetto a combustione.
ita.building.chickenfarm.description: Buon pollaio resistente alle intemperie. Non dimenticare di aspettare che i pulcini crescano!
ita.building.circleofreturn.description: Usa la Pietra del Ritorno per teletrasportarti indietro.
ita.building.conductivefloor.description: Pizzica leggermente i piedi quando ci si tiene sopra
ita.building.coppermine.description: Estrae il rame dalle viscere della terra.
ita.building.deaddoorl.description: Questa porta non è la più resistente, ma eterna.
ita.building.deadwalll.description: Le pareti di legno morto hanno la capacità speciale di essere ripristinate. Come se fossero vive. Proteggile dal fuoco!
ita.building.decorativefloor1.description: Che tipo di base non ha i pavimenti?! Usa diverse varianti per renderla carina.
ita.building.diamonddoor.description: Molto bello. Automatico, come al supermercato!
ita.building.diamondwall.description: Scintilla al sole. Si ripara automaticamente. Più resistente delle pareti d'oro o di pietra.
ita.building.electricspikes.description: È difficile vederlo a terra quando è spento
ita.building.farm.description: Non dimenticare di aspettare che i maialini crescano!
ita.building.fireballtower.description: Misteriosa e magica. Spara palle di fuoco.
ita.building.floor.description: I nemici non possono costruire sui tuoi pavimenti. Comunque, sembra bello.
ita.building.freezer.description: Rendi le cose più fresche! Aiuta a rinfrescarsi nel deserto.
ita.building.goldendoor.description: Una meraviglia dell'ingegneria medievale: può aprirsi e chiudersi. Più resistente di una porta di legno!
ita.building.goldmine.description: Estrae lentamente il minerale d'oro dalle profondità della terra.
ita.building.goldwall.description: La superficie è liscia, con alcune protuberanze. Più resistente delle pareti di legno o pietra. Non infiammabile.
ita.building.guard.description: Si muove lentamente. Guarda intorno dal suo elmetto. Segue i comandi.
ita.building.guardarcher.description: Si muove lentamente. Ama sparare con il suo arco e proteggere le aree. Segue i comandi.
ita.building.heartstone.description: Ti dà una vita in più.
ita.building.lamp.description: Un dispositivo strano che produce luce. Protegge dai mostri notturni.
ita.building.mercenary.description: Ti segue ovunque. Uno per tutti e tutti per uno!
ita.building.motorcyclewithcarrycot.descript: Per te e un amico! Lenta, ma ha un sidecar.
ita.building.phantomtower.description: Affidati alla tua sicurezza agli spiriti maligni.
ita.building.platform.description: Standoci sopra, puoi sparare sopra i tuoi edifici!
ita.building.policecar.description: Proprietà del distretto della contea. Per mantenere l'ordine!
ita.building.privatechest.description: Conserverà ciò che ci metti dentro, anche se lasci il gioco.
ita.building.pumpkinlamp.description: Rende i tuoi nemici più gentili!
ita.building.repairbox.description: Ripara gli oggetti che ci metti dentro, in qualche modo.
ita.building.rockmine.description: Estrae lentamente la pietra dalle profondità della terra.
ita.building.rockwall.description: Più resistente delle pareti in legno. Non brucia.
ita.building.scooter.description: Lento, ma più veloce che camminare!
ita.building.sixcar.description: Per te e i tuoi amici!
ita.building.sleigh.description: È il momento di scivolare giù per la collina!
ita.building.snowmobile.description: Si muove più velocemente sulle superfici innevate. Posti a sedere per due.
ita.building.trap.description: Scattato quando ci si posa sopra, trattiene la vittima. Gli nemici non lo vedono.
ita.building.wallbreaker.description: Sembra una macchina demolitrice. Lo è.
ita.building.wooddoor.description: Solo tu e i tuoi amici potete aprirlo - gli altri non possono entrare.
ita.building.woodenplate.description: Una semplice lastra - assi, chiodi e carbone.
ita.building.woodwall.description: Non male come difesa per iniziare, ma brucia bene.
ita.buildingpotion.description: Ti permette di costruire più velocemente.
ita.cactushat.description: Riflette una piccola quantità di danni.
ita.chitinbow.description: Le frecce di questa balestra trapassano un tronco d'albero!
ita.claws.description: Tre, quattro, meglio chiudere la porta.
ita.club.description: Sulla maniglia ci sono segni grezzi.
ita.coppershield.description: Uno scudo con mille anni di storia.
ita.copperspear.description: L'umanità è iniziata con le copie!
ita.copperthrowingknife.description: Utile nell'economia. Può essere lanciato contro un nemico.
ita.cowhat.description: Chi dice "Mooooooo"? Un lupo travestito da pecora.
ita.crowbar.description: Può essere usata per scassinare le porte!
ita.crownhat.description: Con essa, l'arma non si rompe più!
ita.darkboomerang.description: Una versione migliorata del boomerang normale.
ita.darkspear.description: Trasforma lo scudo nemico in un colino.
ita.darkthrowingknife.description: Vola con la potenza della notte!
ita.diamondshield.description: Buono per le assedi alla base.
ita.druidhat.description: Gli spiriti della foresta richiedono sacrifici. I lupi verranno per le anime dei tuoi nemici.
ita.eaglehat.description: Agilità come un grande uccello! Riduce la fatica.
ita.experiencepotion.description: Ti consente di ottenere più esperienza!
ita.extinguisher.description: Ha una leva facile da usare. Spegne i fuochi.
ita.firepotion.description: Protegge dal fuoco e incendia i nemici.
ita.furhat.description: Mantiene il calore più a lungo nel bioma invernale.
ita.gatherpotion.description: Ti consente di raccogliere più risorse!
ita.goldenbow.description: Fusto resistente, con una forte corda.
ita.goldenhammer.description: Il miglior strumento per la distruzione. Una testa più pesante fornisce un danno maggiore.
ita.goldenhelmet.description: Ti permette di non perdere gli oggetti alla morte, se c'è una pietra delle anime.
ita.goldenshield.description: Può aiutare a sopravvivere in questo mondo.
ita.hammer.description: Strumento per smantellare edifici. Estremamente potente, ma molto lento.
ita.happyclub.description: Una volta all'anno e il bastone spara.
ita.harlequinhat.description: Affonda le pallottole, balla come un arlecchino!
ita.harpoon.description: Come un rampino, ma migliore. Un'arma per coraggiosi cacciatori di mare.
ita.healwand.description: Cura te e la tua squadra!
ita.heraldicshield.description: Lo scudo sembra appartenere a un nobile della Contea di Ginesi. Probabilmente è molto vecchio.
ita.illusionhat.description: Quando hai pochi HP, ti rende invisibile ai nemici.
ita.improvedstickypotion.description: Cattura più nemici in una trappola di melma. Difficile da lavare via
ita.inquisitorhat.description: I primi a imparare come resistere agli incubi furono gli Inquisitori. Tuttavia, dopo l'apparizione delle Bambole Automatiche, furono abbandonati.
ita.invisiblepotion.description: Ti rende invisibile e ti uccide lentamente.
ita.item_description.custom_effect_type.hard: <color=#FF00FF>Probabilità inferiore di colpire attraverso lo scudo.</color>
ita.item_description.custom_effect_type.shad: <color=#FF00FF>Risuscita le anime alla morte del nemico.</color>
ita.jasonhat.description: Ottima maschera da hockey vintage. Aumenta la possibilità di danni critici.
ita.katana.description: Una lama leggera e segnata dalla battaglia.
ita.kunai.description: Permette di infliggere danni attraverso i nemici.
ita.lasersword.description: Creato molto tempo fa, in una galassia lontana lontana...
ita.magichat.description: Le trappole in essa non sono terribili!
ita.moneyhat.description: Triplica il drop di monete. Indossa una fonte di ricchezza sulla tua testa.
ita.monsterhunterhat.description: Cappello del cacciatore di mostri. Funziona su di loro come una spada d'argento.
ita.murderer.description: Tagliente come una lama di rasoio. Troppo pesante per essere usato con una mano sola. Quanti guerrieri ha ucciso?
ita.nightmarescythe.description: Anime inquiete sono imprigionate nella lama.
ita.nightmareshield.description: Lo scudo emana un'aura terribile. Anche stare vicino a lui è insopportabile.
ita.nightmaresuriken.description: Il fischio del volo di questi shiryuken è simile al grido di qualcuno.
ita.notify.coins.lock: Devi effettuare l'accesso per utilizzare le monete!
ita.notify.heartstone_destroyed: La tua pietra del cuore è stata distrutta!
ita.notify.invasion_alert.header: La tua base è stata attaccata!
ita.notify.player_joined: [{0}] si è unito alla tua squadra!
ita.pinkshooterhat.description: Aumenta notevolmente il danno delle armi a distanza.
ita.polarbowrecipe.description: Se leggi questa ricetta, si aprirà la possibilità di creare un nuovo oggetto.

ita.polarhatrecipe.description: Se leggi questa ricetta, si aprirà la possibilità di creare un nuovo oggetto.
ita.polarpotion.description: Aumenta il danno delle armi a lunga gittata!

ita.polarswordrecipe.description: Se leggi questa ricetta, si aprirà la possibilità di creare un nuovo oggetto.
ita.propellerhat.description: La freccia indica oggetti circolari a forma di trappola.
ita.pumpkinhat.description: Ottimo abbigliamento per le vacanze! Può dare caramelle!
ita.ragehat.description: Deve essere stata indossata una volta da un grande berserker Cerniano. Più la morte si avvicina, più forti sono i colpi.
ita.rockethat.description: Alleggerisce gli oggetti e aumenta la velocità di corsa.

ita.shooterhat.description: Aumenta il danno delle armi a distanza.

ita.spear.description: Buono per la caccia. Ignora gli scudi.

ita.spikeshield.description: Scudo di legno migliorato! Coperto di spuntoni.

jpn.acidball.description: 酸の杖のための燃える弾丸、接触時に痛みを引き起こします。

jpn.building.phantomtower.description: 邪悪な霊にあなたの安全を託してください。

jpn.building.sixcar.description: あなたと友達のために！
